title: Virtual Assistant - Social Media, Marketing, Instagram and Brand Management
description:
I am a Sydney Based Nurse and Entrepreneur moving into consultancy, training and education and coordination - think training for other organisations workers, assistance to find aged care facilities, and advice for people trying to manage family members with dementia at home.



I run a busy healthcare business also and work with a lot of VAs who help run this ship smoothly. I'm now looking for a part time VA with the scope to go Full Time in the future to help take over the Nurse Jayden Brand.



Your duties will include:



- Creating and maintaining a cohesive brand across Instagram,
 and 

- Helping to create a website and write content for same

- Content planning and creation - I will make the raw footage videos based on your advice, you edit, cut, create and turn them into something great for each platform

- Engaging with audience and building a following

- Ensuring a cohesive brand across all platforms and managing regular stories on Instagram

- Creating resources and engaging items on Canva - including copywriting, design and finalisation





Essentially, you'll be my go-to, and my "me behind the scenes" for the whole brand.



What I need:



- Intermediate to advanced experience in marketing and social media management with examples

- Ability to start part time with scope to go full time

- A self-starter who can find what needs to be done and get it done

- Responsive, great english and ability to communicate by slack and voice call

- Ability to plan content and tell me exactly what you need to create great content

- Strong canva skills

- Strong video editing skills



Ideally, you will also be happy to do admin and website based tasks.



To apply, please give me a good understanding of your skills and experience including portfolio and experience, as well as salary expectation, and equipment on hand at home.



Thanks!

Nurse Jayden

title: Executive Operating Partner to CEO/Chairman - $1,800-2,200 USD Monthly

THIS IS NOT A STANDARD VIRTUAL ASSISTANT ROLE

title: Business Operations, Data and Financial Analyst
description:
We are a growing Australian healthcare and NDIS disability services group operating residential care, home care, respite and staffing services. Labour is our largest cost and service delivery is our biggest revenue driver — so understanding our numbers is critical. 



We are looking for a highly analytical Business Operations & Data Analyst to help us build visibility across revenue, labour cost, occupancy, and profitability.



This is NOT a data entry role and not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who enjoys working with numbers, building dashboards, and helping leadership make better decisions. 



Responsibilities



You will work directly with the business owner and senior managers to build and maintain operational reports, visualisations and dashboards and be responsible for extracting data, interpreting, visualising and then presenting to the team.



We need someone that can make the complicated uncomplicated and easy to understand, has a commercial focus, and can communicate clearly and visualise data and set goals. From the data, you will set goals. 



For example - someone that can come in, take a look at the cost of us sending work to agency, analyse the cost of our own staff, and then visualise the dollar figure of lost revenue last week/fortnight on agency cost. 



Your work will include:



- Overtime reporting including hours, dollar value, reason analysis and interpreting further (eg. x% of overtime was avoidable)

- Agency spend tracking

- Labour cost per service line (taking into account all of our expenses and determining the actual cost of hours sold)

- Bed occupancy %

- Care minutes invoiced vs paid

- Hours delivered by funding source and building breakeven points (eg. x hours sold to x organisation for breakeven)

- Setting goals for rostering staff to visualise how many hours need to be sold to increase revenue etc

- Breakeven modelling

- Building structured Excel or dashboards

- Presenting and developing clear summaries and reports with visualisations and charts for management to review 

- Setting KPIs and targets for staff based on data



(Our director runs a number of businesses and may request your assistance with other businesses for similar tasks also)



What we are looking for



- 4 years + experience in financial analysis, management reporting and operations analytics

- High proficient in excel (pivot tables, advanced formulas, dashboards)

- Understand labour-based businesses

- Be comfortable working with messy data and improving structure

- Be comfortable working with undeveloped systems and assisting to implement systems through your work 

- Be a strong, confident communicator that is highly experienced in your field

- Be able to provide examples of past work

- Ideally, someone with experience in an Australian market in the NDIS space 



The systems we currently use are Xero, Shiftcare, and Employment Hero, where most data will be kept. 



This is NOT a virtual assistant, data entry or social media role. This is an analytical, commercially focused role.



To apply, please
 us with your resume, a description of your past relative work, and attach a sample dashboard or report that you have created in the past.

title: Technical Customer Support
description:
Role title. Technical Customer Support.



Role summary.

You will provide technical support for FibreMax business voice and internet services, with a strong focus on VoIP and Australian NBN environments. You will own tickets end to end, keep customers updated, and work with suppliers to resolve faults.



What you will do.



1. Respond to support requests promptly, diagnose issues, and communicate the next steps clearly.

2. Troubleshoot VoIP issues, including registration, call routing, one way audio, call quality, and device setup.

3. Support NBN connectivity basics, including router setup, WiFi troubleshooting, and LAN configuration.

4. Provision and change services, extensions, numbers, call flows, IVR menus, queues, voi
 to
, and after hours routing.

5. Manage number porting tasks and service transfers, including checking forms and required details.

6. Escalate to suppliers with good diagnostics, follow up until resolved, confirm fixes with customers.

7. Keep accurate ticket notes, update documentation, improve runbooks and FAQs.



Must have skills and experience.



1. Experience in VoIP, ISP, PBX, or technical customer support.

2. Solid understanding of SIP basics, NAT, codecs, DIDs, and common PBX features.

3. Basic networking knowledge, IP addressing, DHCP, DNS, WiFi, and routers.

4. Clear written and verbal communication, strong attention to detail, calm under pressure.

5. Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and take full ownership of outcomes.



Nice to have.



1. Familiarity with Australian NBN processes and supplier fault handling.

2. Experience with PBX administration and handset support, Grandstream, Yealink, softphones.

3. Comfort reading logs, using portals, and working across multiple systems.



Work requirements.

Remote full time role aligned to AWST. Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and a USB noise cancelling headset.



Performance expectations.

Fast acknowledgement during rostered hours, high quality escalation notes, accurate provisioning, low ticket reopen rates, and regular documentation improvements.

title: Google + Meta Ads VA (Lead Gen) – Corporate Headshots (NJ/NYC)
description:
Google + Meta Ads VA (Lead Gen) – Corporate Headshots (NJ/NYC)

Part-time remote | 5–10 hrs/week | $250/month (fixed) | 30-day paid trial



We’re a professional photography + video company based in New Jersey and NYC. Our primary focus is corporate headshots and personal branding. We already have a landing page and want someone to run paid ads that generate real leads and booked calls.



This role is lead generation focused. We care about qualified inquiries and bookings, not vanity metrics.



What you’ll do

• Manage Google Search Ads (high-intent keywords, match types, negatives, location targeting)

• Manage Meta 
/Instagram) campaigns for lead generation and retargeting

• Verify and maintain conversion tracking (GA4, GTM, form tracking, basic call tracking if available)

• Weekly optimizations based on cost per lead and lead quality

• Improve ad copy and give landing page feedback to increase conversion rate

• Weekly performance update (short, clear, action-based)



Time expectations

• 5–10 hours per week

• Week 1 may be closer to 8–10 hours for setup and cleanup

• After launch, typically 3–5 hours/week for ongoing optimization + reporting



What success looks like (first 30 days)

• Tracking confirmed end-to-end (forms counted correctly)

• Google Search campaigns launched with strong negatives and clean structure

• Meta retargeting running to warm audiences (site visitors + engagers)

• Cost per qualified lead improving week over week with a clear scaling plan



You must have

• Experience running Google Search Ads for service businesses

• Meta Ads experience (lead gen + retargeting)

• Understanding of match types, search terms, negatives, and basic bidding

• Ability to show proof of past work (screenshots/case notes, client names removed is fine)

• Clear communication and clean reporting



To apply (answer all)



What service business Google Search campaigns have you managed? (industry + outcome)



What monthly ad budgets have you worked with?



What was your average cost per lead, and how did you define a “qualified” lead?



How do you set up / verify tracking using GA4 + GTM + form conversions?



If we start with a $2,000/month ad budget for headshots, how would you split it between Google and Meta and why?



List 10 negative keywords you would add for “corporate headshots” to avoid low-intent leads.



Share screenshots or a short case study if available (remove client info).



Only applicants who answer all questions will be considered.

title: VA Assistant for a Marketing Agency
description:

title: Product Listing Specialist
description:
Applications that do not include all required materials will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role.

If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.



About Us:

We are a luxury watch–focused brand seeking to enhance our content and e-commerce strategy. Our audience values accurate, detailed, and refined information on high-end timepieces, including Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Omega, and other leading brands.



We are seeking a detail-oriented Product Listing Specialist to manage and optimize our online product catalog across multiple e-commerce platforms, ensuring accurate presentation, consistency, and alignment with best e-commerce practices to maximize visibility and sales.



Responsibilities:



Listing Creation and Management: Create, maintain, and optimize product listings (titles, descriptions, images, specifications, and pricing) on platforms such as chrono24 and ebay.

Data Accuracy: Ensure all product data is accurate, consistent, and compliant with platform-specific requirements and company standards.

Content Optimization: Work with creative teams to ensure high-quality product images, and compelling, persuasive product copy are used.

Inventory Coordination: Coordinate closely with the inventory and fulfillment teams to maintain accurate stock levels and manage product variations (size, color, etc.).

Error Resolution: Troubleshoot and resolve any listing errors, suppression issues, or data conflicts promptly.

Compliance: Stay up-to-date with platform rule changes, industry trends, and compliance requirements to ensure listings remain active and compliant.



Qualifications:



Required

Proven experience in managing product listings on e-commerce marketplaces (e.g., Amazon Seller Central, Shopify, Walmart Marketplace, eBay).

Exceptional attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

Proficiency in data management, including advanced skills in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets 

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Basic graphic design skills using Canva.

Eager to learn and adapt to new tools and strategies.

Knowledge of understanding processes, documentation of process, documentation of errors in process and propose solutions for errors in process

Big plus if you understand automations like pabbly, zapier, n8n



How to Apply:



To help me get to know you better, please send:



1. Your DISC test - 
  - Please send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).



2. Your personality test - 
  - Please send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).



3. Your typing test - 
 - Please send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).



4.. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.



4. A video or videos that answer the following. Feel free to give as much information and context as possible. Also please make sure that, when you submit the video(s) links, they are in public, viewable format.



a. Introduce and tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. Career/life/financial goals and in what amount of time? Be very specific here. What have you been saving money for? What specific item/asset is it? When do you expect to acquire it? How do you plan on achieving that goal?



b. Show off your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc) and tech setup - browser you use, other tech/platforms you use.



c. Think of one objective you’ve had to complete. What metrics were you measured on? (time, money, etc) Reverse engineer the objective with the target measurement in mind. Map out the process that you came up with in google docs, google sheets, or in canva as a visual representation. How could you have made it easier/faster/better using AI?

title: Social Media Shopper for Luxury Watches
description:
Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



Browse. Discover. Hunt for hidden watch deals.

(No set hours. Total freedom. Serious fun.)



Do you love scrolling through social media and online marketplaces?

Are you obsessed with finding rare gems and scoring amazing deals?

Do you think watches are fascinating — or just plain beautiful?



If you just shouted “YES!”, this might be your dream gig.



About Me

Hi! I’m Wilson. I run a business dedicated to collecting, trading, and selling luxury watches and timepieces. Every day, I’m on the hunt for rare, underpriced, and unique watches — but the internet is huge, and I can’t do it alone.



That’s where you come in. You’ll be my eyes and ears online, helping me discover the next big score.



What You’ll Do

Scan
 groups, marketplaces, Instagram, and other online platforms for watch listings.

Identify undervalued or rare timepieces (don’t worry — I’ll train you to spot them).

Enter potential deals into a Google Sheet with a built-in calculator to evaluate value.

Help grow our collection of rare, desirable watches.



Why You’ll Love This

Total freedom — work anytime, anywhere. No fixed hours.

Paid to scroll — get paid to do what you already love on your phone or laptop.

Hands-on mentorship — learn directly fro
 how to spot high-value deals and develop an investor’s eye.

Niche, valuable skills — gain knowledge about watches, deal analysis, and market trends.

Fun & flexible — perfect for curious minds, treasure hunters, and explorers.



You’re a Great Fit If You:

Love browsing online for interesting items.

Have a sharp eye for detail and enjoy comparing deals.

Are curious about watches and eager to learn more.

Are independent, self-motivated, and reliable.



Bonus: You already follow watch pages, groups, or forums.





To apply, send the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

2. Your personality test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

3. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.

4. Typing Test - Take this typing test (30 seconds): 





5. A video or videos that answer the following. Feel free to give as much information and context as possible. Also please make sure that, when you submit the video(s) links, they are in public, viewable format.



a. Tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. What are your career/life goals and in what amount of time?

b. Show off your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc) and tech setup - browser you use, other tech/platforms you use

c. Think of one objective you’ve had to complete in your current or previous role. Explain what metric(s) were you measured on (time spent, money saved, traffic/engagement/leads/sales, etc). Reverse engineer said objective with the target measurement in mind. Map out the process that you came up with in google docs, google sheets, or in Canva as a visual representation. How could you have made it easier/faster/better using AI?

d. What are your salary expectations from day one until the end of the first calendar year?



This isn’t just another gig — it’s a chance to dive into the fast-paced, luxury-driven world of watches and become a master at spotting hidden gems others overlook.



Ready to start the hunt?

Apply now — let’s find treasures together.



— Wilson

title: Senior WooCommerce / WordPress PHP Developer
description:
We’re looking for an elite, multi-disciplinary WooCommerce & WordPress PHP developer who can engineer complex systems, design high-converting user experiences, and automate business workflows end-to-end.



This role blends backend engineering, system architecture, automation logic, and conversion-focused UI/UX design. You should be equally comfortable writing custom PHP, designing user portals, integrating CRMs, and laying out pages that convert.



What We’re Looking to Build:



Customer Portals & Gated Experiences

Secure customer login systems, dashboards, and account-based portals

Gated, role-based, and membership-style user experiences



CRM Integrations & Data Synchronization

Zoho CRM and GoHighLevel integrations covering contacts, deals, pipelines, custom fields, workflows, and webhooks

Two-way data synchronization between WooCommerce, CRMs, and external systems



Automation & Workflow Engineering

WooCommerce and CRM-driven automation workflows 
, SMS, internal notifications)

Zapier, Make, Pabbly, and n8n integrations, including custom middleware when needed

Reliable, observable, and secure automation systems



UI/UX Design & Conversion Optimization

Conversion-optimized landing pages, product pages, checkout flows, and customer portals

Content-to-layout structuring with intentional hierarchy, spacing, and typography

CRO-focused user journeys and interaction design



Performance, Security & Reliability

Secure authentication, data handling, and access control

Performance-optimized WordPress, WooCommerce, and database systems



Who You Are

Expert-level WordPress and PHP developer, skilled in custom plugins, themes, and backend logic

Experienced in integrations and automation, including APIs, webhooks, and CRM systems (Zoho, GoHighLevel)

Strong understanding of UX and conversion-focused design that supports the sales process

Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-obsessed with a strategic mindset

Able to translate business needs into technically sound, high-performing solutions



Ready to Apply?



I'm excited to review your application! To help me understand if we're a great fit, please share the following:



Your Personality Profile

Share your 16Personalities test result (
/free-personality-test) so I can learn more about how you work and communicate. This helps us understand if we'll be a great team!

A Quick Video to Introduce Yourself

Record a casual video (2-3 minutes) introducing yourself and your workspace. Mention my name, Wilson, and share why you're excited about this role! 



Show Me Your Best Work

Record a screen share showcasing your best WordPress/PHP projects, automation workflows (Zapier, Make, Pabbly, or n8n), and any Zoho or GoHighLevel integrations you've built. Walk me through your code and show me your workflow



Your Background & Experience

Share your resume or a brief summary of your experience and any standout projects you're proud of!





I'm looking forward to learning more about you and seeing what you've built. If you have any questions before applying, feel free to reach out!

description:

Hi! My name is Wilson, and I run a business dedicated to helping people shop for and learn about luxury watches.



If you’re passionate about watches — their design, history, and the stories they tell — and you love writing, this is an exciting opportunity to combine both passions.



What You’ll Do

As our Content Writing Specialist, you will:

 newsletters, and other marketing channels.

Have a genuine love for watches, luxury goods, or horology.

Have proven experience as a content writer, copywriter, or in a similar role.

Have strong writing, editing, and proofreading skills — you know how to captivate and inform.

Are skilled in SEO best practices, including keyword research and content optimization.

Are familiar with content management systems (WordPress preferred) and basic HTML (a plus).

Are independent, detail-oriented, and able to meet tight deadlines.

Competitive pay plan.

We are seeking a versatile Video Editor skilled in producing both long-form content (YouTube

faceless videos, luxury watch tour videos) and short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels,

YouTube Shorts). You will transform raw footage into polished, engaging videos optimized for

watch tour videos.

- Create short-form videos such as TikToks, Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other social clips.

- Repurpose long-form videos into short, engaging bite-sized content.

- Proven experience editing both long-form and short-form content (portfolio or demo reel

required).

- Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, rhythm, and audience retention strategies.

- Experience creating platform-optimized content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels,

and Shorts.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail.

title: AI Systems Architect / Automation Lead (TCR Prototype Build)
description:
About the Role



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role to build the first working prototype of TCR, an AI-driven property operations platform.



This is not a research role.

This is not a strategy-only role.

This is not a “play with AI tools” role.



Your job is to design, build, and ship systems that remove human labour in property management workflows.



If you do not ship working systems, this role will not continue.



?



Core Responsibilities

 • Design and build AI-driven workflows for:

 • Tenant communications

 • Maintenance triage

 • Guided inspections (self-service)

 • Admin and compliance preparation

 • Integrate AI models (OpenAI or equivalent) into real operational flows

 • Build automations using tools such as Make, Zapier, APIs, and databases

 • Connect systems to CRMs, spreadsheets, and internal tools

 • Deliver weekly working demos

 • Continuously reduce manual human steps

 • Document systems clearly for replication and scale



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Manual processes are replaced with automated workflows

 • Human time per property is measurably reduced

 • Systems run without constant oversight

 • MVP features are live, testable, and improving weekly

 • Problems are solved with systems, not workarounds



?



What This Role Is Not

 • Not training AI models from scratch

 • Not building dashboards for presentation only

 • Not attending unnecessary meetings

 • Not writing long strategy documents

 • Not custom-building edge cases



If it does not remove labour, it does not ship.



?



Required Experience

 • Proven experience building automation systems

 • Hands-on use of AI / LLM APIs

 • Experience with automation platforms (Make preferred, Zapier acceptable)

 • Experience integrating CRMs, databases, or APIs

 • Strong systems thinking and problem-solving ability

 • Ability to work independently and deliver without hand-holding



?



Nice to Have (Not Required)

 • Experience in property, real estate, or operational businesses

 • GoHighLevel experience

 • Startup or MVP build experience

 • Basic front-end or scripting skills



?



Working Style

 • Output-driven, not hours-driven

 • Minimal meetings, maximum delivery

 • Clear rules and workflows

 • No exceptions without justification



This is a boring execution role with very high leverage.



?



How to Apply



Send:

 1. A short introduction (maximum five sentences)

 2. One or two examples of systems you have built

 3. Tools you have actually used

 4. One example where automation replaced manual work



No essays. No hype. Proof only.

title: Content Producer & Social Media Manager
description:
Brand: ThisIsDulan

Employment Type: Full-Time (Remote Preferred)

Reports To: Founder (Dulan)



About the Brand



The Founder lives in Melbourne Australia

ThisIsDulan is a growing food and lifestyle media brand built around Sri Lankan cuisine, storytelling, and entrepreneurship. Led by a MasterChef Australia contestant and founder of a successful construction company, the brand combines authentic cooking, cultural storytelling, and real-life business experiences.



Our goal is to grow into a global digital media brand across YouTube, Instagram TikTok and Pinterest while building monetisation through digital products, brand partnerships, and online education.



We are looking for a highly organised and creative Content Producer to run the day-to-day content engine. Someone who will grow with this brand and work with us long term creating this a successful career. 



Role Summary



You will be responsible for managing the full lifecycle of content:



Idea ? Script ? Edit ? Publish ? Grow ? Monetise



Your role is to turn weekly filming sessions into high-quality content distributed across multiple platforms while continuously improving performance using trends and analytics.



This role is part creative, part strategist, and part operator.



Key Responsibilities - 



1) Content Strategy & Research



- Research weekly social media trends (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



- Develop content ideas aligned with brand pillars



- Create weekly content calendar



- Write hooks, captions, and video outlines



- Identify viral formats suitable for food content



2) Video Editing & Production



- Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)



- Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–12 minutes)



- Add subtitles, sound effects, and pacing for retention



- Select strong hooks within first 3 seconds



- Create engaging thumbnails for YouTube



3) Publishing & Platform Management

Schedule and publish content across:



- YouTube



- Instagram



- TikTok



- Pinterest



- Optimise titles, hashtags, and descriptions



- Maintain posting consistency



- Repurpose content across platforms



4) Graphic & Digital Asset Creation



- Design recipe cards and carousel posts



- Create social media graphics



- Develop downloadable recipe PDFs



- Maintain brand visual consistency



5) Growth & Analytics



- Track weekly performance metrics



- Identify top-performing content patterns



- Recommend improvements based on analytics



- Test new content formats regularly



6) Monetisation Support



Assist with:



- YouTube monetisation optimisation



- Affiliate link setup



- Digital product preparation



- Brand partnership outreach materials



Workflow Structure - 



- Founder films cooking content once per week.



- You transform footage into 15–25 pieces of content weekly.



- You manage publishing and optimisation.



Required Skills

Must Have;



- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut)



- Experience editing short-form content



- Understanding of TikTok & Reels pacing



- Good English writing skills



- Ability to work independently



- Strong organisation and deadline management



Highly Preferred; 



- Experience with food or lifestyle creators



- YouTube SEO knowledge



- Thumbnail design experience



- Canva or Adobe design skills



- Understanding of storytelling editing



Personal Qualities We Value;



- Creative thinker



- Detail oriented



- Proactive (suggests ideas without waiting)



- Passion for food & storytelling



- Growth mindset



- Long-term team player



Success Metrics (First 3 Months)



You will be successful if:



- Consistent posting schedule achieved



- YouTube channel launched and growing



- Engagement rate improves



- Content output reaches 15–25 posts/week



- Audience growth trend established



Remuneration Opportunities - 

The long term successful manager will benefit from growth of this business, will be offered a performance based bonuses after probationary period along with a strong salary



Performance bonuses available based on channel growth.

Working Structure



- Full-time role



- Weekly planning meeting with founder



- Long-term growth opportunity



Growth Opportunity

This role will evolve into:



- Head of Content / Media Manager as the brand scales.



You will help build a global food media brand from the ground up.





Application Requirements- 

Please include:



- Portfolio of edited videos (REQUIRED)



- 3 social media accounts you admire and why



- Example short-form edit you have created



- Tools/software you use



- Internet speed and equipment details



- Please only apply if you have genuine willingness to be with a company for a long time and you are willing to put your 100?fort into this role. 



- Please don't apply if you are looking to freelance to other people while working on this job full time.

title: Performance Video Editor & Ad Designer (Paid Media)
description:
We’re LeadSense.



We generate high-intent consumer leads at scale across insurance, financial services and home services in the UK and North America, working with some of the largest buyers in each market.



We are hiring a Performance Video Editor & Ad Designer to support our paid media team with high-volume ad production.



This is not a branding role. This is a performance-driven role. Speed, structured variation and execution discipline matter more than artistic perfection.



Fully remote. Strong English required.



The Role



You will work closely with media buyers and leadership to produce video and image ads for Meta, YouTube and Native campaigns.



Your job is to ensure creative production never becomes a bottleneck.



You will receive:

• Scripts

• Hooks and angles

• Examples of winning ads

• Clear briefs



Your responsibility is to turn those into structured, high-volume variations quickly.



 What You’ll Do



• Edit short-form performance video ads (15–60 seconds)

• Create multiple variations from one concept (hooks, captions, CTA changes)

• Design static image ads for testing different angles

• Format creatives for multiple placements (feed, stories, reels, native)

• Add subtitles, captions and simple motion graphics

• Use templates to increase speed and consistency

• Use AI tools where appropriate to improve production efficiency

• Organise creative assets clearly for testing



What We’re Looking For



You think in terms of testing, angles and conversion — not just aesthetics.



• 2+ years experience editing paid media ads

• Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, After Effects or similar)

• Comfortable creating static ad creatives (Canva, Photoshop or similar)

• Able to produce high volumes of variations efficiently

• Strong English comprehension

• Reliable communication and fast turnaround



Nice to have:

Direct response experience · UGC-style editing · Experience in lead generation · Familiarity with AI editing tools



What Success Looks Like



• Media buyers always have fresh creative variations to test

• Creative production is fast and structured

• Testing velocity increases

• Turnaround time is measured in hours, not days

• Creative is organised and easy to deploy



Hiring Process



 1. Apply with answers to the screening questions below

 2. Paid test task (2–3 hours)

 3. 30-minute interview

 4. Trial period

 5. Long-term collaboration if it’s a fit



If you understand that ads are built to convert — not to impress — we’d like to hear from you.



Screening Questions



1. Please share a link to your portfolio or examples of performance videos and image ads you have created.



2. Briefly describe your process for creating ad creatives and the main tools you use (including any AI tools).



3. What is the minimum number of hours per week you would require to commit to a long-term collaboration with us?

title: Amazon Account Manager / Operations Manager
description:
Are you a strategic, data-driven brand builder with a passion for Amazon?

We are a fast-growing Amazon private label brand looking for a full-time Amazon Account Manager to take ownership of our product development pipeline, listing optimization, and brand positioning.



You’ll play a key leadership role in launching products, optimizing conversion rates, and developing a strong, consistent brand presence. This is a long-term opportunity with potential for growth in a collaborative, performance-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Accountability & Ownership

-Lead and maintain a robust product development pipeline (from idea to launch)

-Optimize product listings for maximum visibility and conversions

-Manage all branding, positioning, and messaging efforts

-Implement CRO strategies and run continuous A/B tests

-Coordinate freelancers (designers, photographers, content creators)

-Monitor and improve brand health metrics: rankings, reviews, CTR, CR, etc.



Daily & Weekly Tasks

-Research product trends and discover new product ideas

-Analyze competitors for differentiation and CRO opportunities

-Track performance: sessions, conversion rates, sales rank

-Collaborate with supply chain, PPC, and creative teams to align launch and inventory strategies



Long-Term Projects & Goals

-Build a consistent and strategic brand identity across all customer touchpoints

-Establish a repeatable, scalable system for product launches

-Increase customer loyalty and retention through compelling branding and messaging



 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

KPI 1: Product Development Pipeline

Objective: Develop and maintain a validated pipeline of launch-ready products

Metrics: 

-Number of product ideas researched and validated monthly

-Number of products launched per quarter

-First 90-day sales & review performance



Actions:

-Run research & validation using Helium 10 and market analysis

-Coordinate with suppliers, creatives, and PPC

-Maintain and update Product Pipeline Tracker



KPI 2: Conversion Rate Optimization

Objective: Improve listing performance through CRO strategies

Metric: Conversion Rate (%) from Amazon Business Reports

Actions:

-Optimize listings, copy, and A+ content

-Improve visuals and run split tests

-Monitor and iterate based on data and performance feedback



 Qualifications & Skills

Required:

-3+ years of experience managing private label brands on Amazon

-Proven success with multiple product launches

-Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and the Amazon algorithm

-Expertise in Helium 10, keyword research, and listing optimization

-Skilled in briefing and coordinating designers and content teams

-Familiarity with A+ content, storefront management, and conversion tracking



Preferred:

-Background in marketing, branding, or e-commerce growth strategy

-Knowledge of CRO tools and testing platforms (e.g., ManageByStats, Splitly)

-Experience using tools like Asana, Notion, or Trello for project management

-Awareness of PPC’s influence on organic ranking



 Soft Skills:

-High attention to detail and ownership mentality

-Strong marketing sense and customer-centric thinking

-Excellent written and verbal English communication

-Organized, self-driven, and proactive

-Analytical mindset – able to turn data into decisions



 What We Offer

-Competitive rates

-Fully remote, flexible working hours

-Bi-weekly payments and performance reviews

-Long-term role with growth potential

-Paid leave and additional benefits after 6 months (SSS, Pag-ibig, health insurance)

-Supportive team culture with room for innovation and contribution

-Training resources and personal development opportunities



 How to Apply:

1. Include in subject line: “[Your Favorite Book] - Amazon Brand Manager Application”

2. Attach your updated resume

3. Include a short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and describing your:

-Experience with Amazon product research

-Tools you’ve used and how you used them

-One product you’ve helped launch and what made it successful

4. Complete the internet speed test from speedtest.net and attach a screenshot

5. Attach a screenshot with your computer specs.



Why Join Us?

This is more than just a brand management job. It’s an opportunity to lead, build, and scale something meaningful. If you’re driven by impact, autonomy, and a clear path to success, we’d love to meet you.

title: Amazon Account / Brand Operations Manager (Private Label)
description:
Are you a strategic, data-driven Amazon operator with a passion for optimization and brand growth?

We are a fast-growing Amazon private label brand seeking a full-time Amazon Account / Brand Operations Manager to oversee our listing performance, conversion optimization, and brand presence on Amazon.



You’ll play a key leadership role in improving conversion rates, maintaining a strong brand identity, and driving account health through data-backed decisions. This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential in a collaborative, performance-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

Accountability & Ownership

Own and optimize Amazon listings for maximum visibility and conversions

Manage brand positioning, messaging, and consistency across listings, A+ content, and storefront

Implement CRO strategies and coordinate ongoing A/B tests

Coordinate freelancers and vendors (designers, photographers, copywriters, content creators)

Monitor and improve brand health metrics: rankings, reviews, CTR, CR, Buy Box, etc.

Ensure Amazon account hygiene: compliance, suppressed listings, variations, flat files (as needed), category attributes, and policy adherence



Daily & Weekly Tasks

Perform ongoing listing audits and implement improvements (titles, bullets, images, backend, A+, attributes)

Analyze competitors for positioning and conversion opportunities (without product scouting)

Track performance: sessions, conversion rate, CTR, sales rank, review velocity, return rate

Collaborate with PPC, supply chain, and creative teams to align:

Listing updates with ad strategy

Inventory levels with promo and demand forecasts

Creative needs with conversion goals

Manage reporting and ensure action items are executed consistently



Long-Term Projects & Goals

Build a consistent, strategic brand identity across all customer touchpoints on Amazon

Create a repeatable system for ongoing listing improvement and CRO

Improve customer loyalty and retention through stronger messaging, brand voice, and content

Develop SOPs for listing updates, creative briefs, review management, and performance reporting



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

KPI 1: Listing Quality & Organic Performance

Objective: Improve listing visibility and discoverability through optimization



Metrics:

Keyword indexing coverage + organic rank improvements

CTR improvements (Search + ads-supported)

Reduction in suppressed/invalid attributes and listing issues

Actions:

Run keyword research and update listings using Helium 10 + market analysis

Maintain listing audit checklist and optimization tracker

Monitor indexing, rank trends, and category attribute completeness



KPI 2: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Objective: Improve conversion rate through data-backed iteration

Metric: Conversion Rate (%) from Amazon Business Reports

Actions:

Optimize copy, images, A+ content, and brand story

Run split tests where possible (ManageByStats, Splitly, Experiments, or equivalent)

Monitor behavior signals (CTR, CVR, returns, reviews) and iterate



KPI 3: Brand Health & Customer Trust

Objective: Improve brand reputation and customer experience

Metrics:

Review rating + review velocity

Return rate trends and top return reasons

Q&A hygiene and listing clarity improvements

Actions:

Review monitoring + recurring issue reporting

Coordinate content updates to address objections/returns

Strengthen product education via visuals + A+ modules

Qualifications & Skills



Required

3+ years managing private label brands on Amazon (account management / listing optimization

Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and algorithm fundamentals

Strong experience with Helium 10, keyword research, and listing optimization

Proven ability to brief and coordinate creatives (designers, copywriters, photographers)

Familiarity with A+ content, storefront management, and conversion tracking

Strong operational discipline: can manage tasks, trackers, and deadlines without hand-holding



Preferred

Background in marketing, branding, or e-commerce growth strategy

Experience with CRO/testing platforms (e.g., ManageByStats, Splitly, Amazon Experiments)

Experience using Asana, Notion, or Trello for project management

Understanding of PPC’s relationship to CTR/CVR and organic rank (coordination-level, not necessarily hands-on media buying)



Soft Skills

Ownership mentality and high attention to detail

Strong marketing instincts and customer-centric thinking

Excellent written and verbal English communication

Organized, proactive, and reliable

Analytical mindset — able to turn data into decisions



What We Offer

Competitive rates

Fully remote

Bi-weekly payments and performance reviews

Long-term role with growth potential

Paid leave and additional benefits after 6 months (SSS, Pag-ibig, health insurance)

Supportive team culture with room for innovation and contribution

Training resources and personal development opportunities



How to Apply

Include in subject line: “[Your Favorite Book] - Amazon Account / Brand Manager Application”

Attach your updated resume

Include a short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and describing your:

Experience optimizing Amazon listings and improving conversion rates

Tools you’ve used and how you used them

A specific listing improvement you made and the result (CTR/CVR/rank/reviews)

Complete the internet speed test from speedtest.net and attach a screenshot

Attach a screenshot with your computer specs



Why Join Us?

This is more than just account management. It’s an opportunity to take ownership of Amazon performance, strengthen a real brand, and build systems that scale. If you’re driven by impact, autonomy, and measurable outcomes, we’d love to meet you.

title: VA
description:

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Expert (E-commerce Growth Specialist)
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking for a high-level Klaviyo Specialist to take full ownership of our
 and SMS channels. We don't just want someone to "schedule campaigns" we want a strategist who understands segmentation, retention, and how to turn a list into a profit-generating machine.



Your role will be central to our customer lifetime value (LTV).



Key Responsibilities

Flow Optimization: Audit, build, and optimize core Klaviyo flows (Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Win-back, Sunset flows).



Campaign Management: Plan and execute 3–5 high-converting weekly campaigns, including design, copy, and technical setup.



Advanced Segmentation: Move beyond "batch and blast." Create segments based on buying behavior, engagement, and predictive analytics.



A/B Testing: Constantly test subject lines, layouts, and send times to improve Open Rates and CTR.



Reporting: Track and report on key metrics (Klaviyo-attributed revenue, Deliverability, Unsubscribe rates) every week.



List Hygiene: Maintain high deliverability by managing list health and suppressing unengaged profiles.



Requirements

Proven Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience managing Klaviyo for successful Shopify brands.



Portfolio: Ability to show examples of
 designs and case studies of revenue growth you’ve driven.



Analytical Mind: You enjoy looking at the data to see what’s working and what isn't.



Copywriting Skills: You can write compelling, brand-aligned copy that converts.



Technical Savvy: Deep understanding of Shopify integrations and Klaviyo’s advanced features.



Attention to Detail: "Good enough" isn't in your vocabulary.



What We Offer

Competitive salary (paid on time, every time).



Long-term stability with a brand that is scaling aggressively.



Performance-based bonuses (We win, you win).



Flexible, 100% remote work environment.



How to Apply..

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please follow these steps:



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am your Klaviyo Growth Partner"



Include a link to your portfolio or 3 screenshots of your best-performing Klaviyo flows/campaigns.



Tell us about one specific campaign you ran that resulted in a significant ROI.

title: Full-Stack Laravel Developer (Process-Driven & Proactive)
description:
Company: RH Elite Services Limited – Award-Winning UK Digital Marketing Agency

Work Schedule: Full-Time (8 hours/day), Monday – Friday

Start Date: Immediate



We are an award-winning digital marketing agency based in the UK, specialising in high-end custom websites and complex web applications. Most of our projects are built on the Laravel framework, and we are looking for a developer who treats coding as a craft, not just a task.



We need someone who doesn't just wait for instructions but has the initiative to suggest better UI/UX flows and help us optimise our internal development processes.





To be successful in this role, you must be highly proficient in:



- PHP & Laravel: Deep understanding of the framework is non-negotiable.

- Server Management: Experienced with Digital Ocean managed via Laravel Forge.

- Infrastructure: Confident using Cloudflare and Amazon AWS / SES.

- Version Control: Expert use of GitHub (Clean commits, branching, PRs).

- Frontend: A strong eye for website flow, design, and usability.



What We Are Looking For:



- Communication: You must have excellent written and spoken English. You’ll be part of a collaborative team where clarity is key.

- The "Process" Mindset: We want someone who looks at how we work and asks, "Can we make this more efficient?"

- Initiative: If a design looks "off" or a user flow feels clunky, we expect you to speak up and offer solutions.

- Reliability: This is a full-time, long-term commitment. You must be available for 8 hours a day (working hours will be discussed to find a balance between UK time and your local time).





We value your time and ours. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Paid Trial. You will be given a series of tasks designed to test your technical skills, your logic, and how well you fit into our agency's workflow.





We receive a lot of applications, and we only want to work with people who have great attention to detail. To prove you’ve read this:



- Start your application message with the words: "Laravel is my Craft."

- Briefly mention one specific Laravel feature or package you love using and why.

- Include a link to your GitHub profile or a portfolio of Laravel projects.

- Applications that do not follow these three steps will be ignored.





We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Executive Assistant to the Founder
description:

s

title: Sales

At IEVA, we work with students and professionals across 20+ countries — and we need someone who can match our pace, energy, and standards. This role is for someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do. You move, you follow up, you close.

title: Experienced Vehicle Graphic Designer (Full-Time – Remote)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing UK-based company specialising in pre-cut vehicle sign writing kits and magnetic signs. We design professional vehicle graphics for trades businesses across the UK.



We are expanding our remote design team and are looking for an experienced vehicle graphic designer who understands layout, alignment and print-ready production.



This is not a beginner role.



What You Will Be Doing



Designing vehicle graphics using provided vehicle templates



Creating clean, bold layouts for vans and commercial vehicles



Preparing print-ready artwork (AI / EPS / PDF)



Following structured design briefs



Working to daily output targets



Making revisions quickly and accurately



Essential Requirements



You must:



Have proven experience designing vehicle graphics



Be highly skilled in Adobe Illustrator (expert level)



Understand bleed, panel tolerances and safe zones



Be able to work with vehicle templates accurately



Have strong typography and layout skills



Have fast turnaround times



Have reliable internet and availability for full-time hours



Important



You will be required to complete a paid test task before hiring.



This will involve designing a vehicle layout using one of our templates to assess:



Alignment accuracy



Layout strength



Attention to detail



Speed



Applications without a portfolio showing vehicle designs will not be considered.



To Apply

title: Virtual Assistant
description: I’m looking for a highly organized and proactive Personal/Professional Assistant who can help me streamline and manage my day-to-day operations across multiple platforms, including Slack, ClickUp, and Google Meet. The ideal candidate will monitor and follow up on Slack conversations, track and update tasks in ClickUp, manage my calendar and meetings, organize and summarize meeting minutes, and proactively prepare clear action items and priority lists to keep me focused on high-impact decisions. I need someone detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and responsive who can act as a central coordination point across systems, ensure nothing falls through the cracks, and provide structured daily and weekly updates on pending tasks, deadlines, and key follow-ups. The goal is to create clarity, accountability, and operational efficiency so I can focus on strategy, partnerships, and growth.

title: High-Converting Video Editor (E-com & Dropshipping VSL Specialist)
description:
We are an aggressive e-commerce brand on a trajectory to massive scale. We don’t want "cinematic" wedding editors; we want growth-minded storytellers who know how to stop the scroll and print money.



You will be responsible for taking raw footage, UGC, and stock assets and turning them into high-converting VSLs  and social media ads (FB/IG/TikTok) that maintain a high ROAS.





VSL Production: Editing long-form and short-form Video Sales Letters that follow direct-response frameworks (Problem > Agitation > Solution > CTA).



Direct Response Design: Adding high-quality captions, progress bars, call-outs, and pattern interrupts to keep viewers engaged.



Rapid Iteration: Taking winning ads and creating 5–10 "variations" (different hooks/CTAs) for A/B testing.



Sound Design: Using trending audio, SFX (whooshes, dings, transitions), and professional leveling to drive emotional impact.



Required Skills & Experience

Portfolio is Everything: You MUST have a proven track record of editing ads for Shopify, Dropshipping, or E-com brands.





Speed: Ability to turn around high-quality edits within 24–48 hours.



Communication: Ability to take creative direction and feedback without ego.



What’s In It For You?

Competitive Salary



Performance Bonuses: When our ads kill it, you get a piece of the pie.



Growth: Work directly with a founding team obsessed with scaling to 9 and 10 figures.



Remote Freedom: 100% work-from-home.



How To Apply (Read Carefully)

To filter out automated bots and "copy-paste" applicants, we only review candidates who do the following:



Subject Line: Change it to: "I Edit Ads That Sell - [Your Name]"



The Portfolio: Send a link to a folder or reel specifically showcasing E-com Ads or VSLs. (Do not send wedding videos or gaming montages).



The Test: Tell us your favorite "Hook" strategy for a product that solves a common problem.



Tools: List your PC/Mac specs and your internet speed.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

1. Ads hook viewers in the first 3 seconds and hold them past 10.

2. Every edit is clean, fast, and built to stop the scroll (not just look good.)

3. You deliver finished ads on time so the media team can launch without delays.

4. Creative Director and Creative Strategist trust you to bring a brief to life in CapCut w/o constant revisions.



WHAT YOU OWN

Edit Ads That Hold Attention: Produce 30-second to 2-minute video ads that hook viewers fast and keep them watching past the 10-second mark.

Deliver Edits On Time: Complete all video edits by the agreed deadline so campaigns launch on schedule.

Work Clean in CapCut: Keep CapCut projects organized and export-ready so files are easy to hand off, revise, or repurpose.



Key KPI: Average Video Watch Time of 10 Seconds



Full Job Description:

title: FACEBOOK - META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY
description:

US (PST or EST) time zone overlap (minimum 4 hours); Time Doctor Required



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing AI appointment generation agency serving high-value healthcare and aesthetics clients, including med spas, LASIK clinics, IVF centres, and plastic surgery practices. We generate premium appointments that convert into paying clients, and we’re looking for a Media Buyer who already has proven experience in these industries.



Direct experience running paid campaigns for med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery, a STRONG ADVANTAGE

EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS

•	2+ years
/Meta Ads experience, with direct experience in med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery.

•	Portfolio demonstrating ad spend managed and appointment generation results.

•	Proven ability to scale campaigns 3x+ while maintaining cost targets.

•	Experience running both B2B and B2C appointment campaigns.

•	Multiple industry experience preferred.



WHAT TO PROVE IN YOUR APPLICATION

•	Screenshots of ad account dashboards showing spend and performance.

•	Specific cost per appointment improvements achieved (with numbers).

•	Biggest campaign rescue/turnaround story.

•	Experience managing large monthly ad budgets in healthcare or aesthetics.



TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH

•	First 30 days: Onboarding with our proven appointment generation frameworks.

•	Month 2–3: Full account ownership and performance accountability.

•	Ongoing: Advanced appointment generation strategies, AI creative training, and mentorship.

•	Performance bonuses tied to client retention and appointment quality.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

•	Advanced
 Business Manager and Ads Manager skills

•	Conversion tracking setup and optimisation

•	CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly)

•	Landing page optimisation knowledge

•	Video editing software familiarity (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro)



PERSONALITY TRAITS WE’RE SEEKING

•	Obsessed with appointment quality and show rates, not just volume

•	Creative problem solver who thinks beyond templates

•	Takes ownership of results and client success

•	Proactive communication about performance trends

•	Organised, trustworthy, and able to deliver in a timely manner

•	Understands that compensation is based on a 40-hour work week

•	Understands that the use of Time Doctor is a productivity measure, not a matter of trust.



RED FLAGS (DON’T APPLY IF)

•	You are not available for full-time 40-hour work week

•	You cannot provide specific metrics from previous roles

•	You cannot commit to US (PST or EST) time zone overlap



COMPENSATION DETAILS

•	Base: $1,500–2,000/month depending on experience

•	Performance bonuses: $200–500/month for hitting appointment targets

•	Annual raises: 15–25% for top performers

•	Paid vacation and sick leave eligibility after 3 months

•	13th Month Salary eligibility after 3 months

•	Access to premium software, AI tools, live masterminds & paid communities



HOW TO APPLY

SELECTION PROCESS

title: Telephone Sales Appointment Setter + Transfer Agent $$$
description:
We are an outdoor shed & bathroom remodeling company and we provide outdoor shed builds and quick affordable bathroom remodels to our customers.



You will be Working 30 Hours Per Week In Eastern Standard Time Zone (EST) - Hours Range From 10am to 7pm EST (Hours Are Variable)



You will be calling leads from our homeowner lead list & ask a few questions.



You will use our script and then transfer the call or set a general time for us to call them back. You will have access to our calendar link.



We keep our scripts super simple and your job is to move the potential customer along in the process.



1.) You will contact leads via telephone / CRM.



2.) Ask To Speak To The Prospect & Issue An Assessment & Read The Script



3.) Take Notes & Generate Interest From The Caller. Transfer the lead (individual) to our sales team or assigned call center for further conversation or set a time for our appointment setting team to call back later.



4.) Follow Up With Leads As Needed. Text leads company information / quotes details / and other information as directed by manager.



Other Virtual Assistant Tasks such as (but not limited to)
, virtual assistant tasks, calling & following up on other leads, and inputting customer/lead information into CRM or slack as directed.



We Use Podio For our CRM and we also use an auto dialer as well.



Please be ready for video interview ASAP. We are looking for someone to start ASAP!



You will be trained & You will be paid weekly.

We give bonuses & commissions for high performers! For each shed that closes or results in a deal / sale - you will get $60 commission.



If you are a great sales person, you will make more money with us. We are very fair.

If you are not consistent or cant show up for work - please don't apply.



Please send a quick 30 second to 90 second audio (voice) clip introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a good person for the job.



Please Use Vocaroo for the audio clip or you may send it via other method. This will help me contact you and interview you quicker.



We are looking to HIRE someone today & start ASAP!



Commission & Bonus Available Plus Hourly salary $4/hr - $5/hr.

title: Technical Operations Manager & WordPress Right-Hand
description:
I run a fast-growing WordPress agency in Australia (JRoc Digital). I currently have a dedicated Designer and Developer, but I am looking for a Technical Operations Manager to be my right-hand person and help me run the engine room of the business.



This is not just a "data entry" or "clicking buttons" role. I am looking for a technical partner who understands systems, servers, and the WordPress ecosystem, and who eventually wants to coordinate the workflow between our design and development teams.



What you will be doing:



- Technical Maintenance: Managing weekly updates, backups, and security via WP Umbrella for our 12+ client sites.



- Server & Hosting: Handling cPanel/WHM setups, DNS configurations, and site migrations.



- The "Bridge": Reviewing Figma designs to ensure they are dev-ready, and then auditing the developer's work to ensure it matches the design perfectly.



- Systems Building: Helping me document our agency workflows (SOPs) so we can scale efficiently.



- Support: Managing our technical support inbox and responding to client requests during Australian business hours (AEST).



About You:

• You have 5+ years of experience in WordPress and Web Hosting support.

• You are a "systems thinker" (you love documentation and finding better ways to do things).

• You have excellent professional English (written and verbal).

• You are looking for a long-term home where you can grow as the agency grows.

• You can check in and be active during Australian Business Hours (AEST).



How to Apply:

Please send me a message with the subject line "I am your Right-Hand Man/Woman" and tell me:



1. One technical improvement you’ve made for a previous client that you’re proud of.

2. What documentation or information you would need fro
 on Day 1 to be successful.
