title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260304
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Product Listing + Descriptions + Mockups (Shopify/Amazon/eBay/Etsy+)
description:
We’re a UK-based company in the memorial industry (plaques, memorial products). We’re hiring a reliable, detail-focused tea
mber in the Philippines to help with product setup and product listings across Shopify and multiple marketplaces — including writing high-quality product descriptions and creating clean mockup images.



This starts as a temporary role, with the opportunity to continue long-term for the right person.



Schedule



Full-time: 8 hours/day, Monday–Friday



Schedule: mostly fixed, but flexible for the right person



You must be able to overlap with UK time (London) each day



Paid trial period (short paid test/trial to confirm fit)



What You’ll Be Doing



Product Setup & Listing (Shopify + Marketplaces)



Create and edit products in Shopify: titles, descriptions, variants, pricing, images, tags/collections, and product organisation



Build and maintain consistent listings across Amazon, eBay, Etsy (and other marketplaces as needed)



Format listings properly for each platform (categories, variations, attributes, compliance)



Maintain accuracy and consistency across channels (details matter in our industry)



Product Description Writing (Very Important)



Write clear, persuasive, well-structured product descriptions for memorial products



Translate product details into customer-friendly benefits and options (including personalisation)



Keep tone respectful and appropriate for memorial products



Ensure spelling, grammar, and formatting are excellent



Follow brand/style guidance and keep descriptions consistent across channels



Amazon Seller Central + A+ Content (Very Important)



Create and optimise Amazon listings in Seller Central



Build and update Amazon A+ Content (modules, layouts, image/text assets)



Ensure A+ content looks professional and matches our brand standards



Graphic Design / Mockup Images (Required)

You will often start from blank product images and need to create clean, professional listing visuals.



Create mockup images for products (e.g., personalisation examples, layout previews, option visuals)



Resize/crop/prepare images to match each platform’s requirements



Keep visual standards consistent across listings



Tools (Required)



Photoshop



Canva

(Other design tools are a bonus)



You’re a Great Fit If…



You have proven Shopify product listing experience



You can write strong English product descriptions (this is essential)



You have Amazon listing experience AND A+ Content experience (important)



You’ve worked with eBay and/or Etsy listings (preferred)



You are highly detail-oriented and organised



You can produce clean mockup images quickly and accurately



You communicate clearly and ask good questions when needed



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Bulk editing (CSV), templates, or listing tools



SEO basics for product titles and descriptions



Experience with variation-heavy / personalised products



Important Note About Our Industry

These are memorial products, so we need someone who writes and presents products with a respectful tone, and who understands accuracy is critical.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)

Please send:



A short introduction (2–5 lines) summarising your relevant experience



Which platforms you’ve used: Shopify / Amazon / eBay / Etsy (and what you did on each)



Portfolio or samples:



listing examples you created (links or screenshots)



mockup images you created



A+ Content examples if you have them



Your availability and your preferred working hours (include your overlap with UK time)



Answer this question to prove you read the post:

Start your application with the word: MEMORIAL



Applications that don’t start with MEMORIAL will be ignored.



Paid Trial Task

Shortlisted applicants will be given a paid trial task, such as:



Create 1 Shopify product listing from provided info and images



Write a complete description for the product (with correct tone and options/personalisation)



Create 2–3 mockup images from blank images



Create or outline an A+ Content layout for the same product (modules + assets needed)



If you’re fast, careful, and take pride in clean, professional work, we’d love to meet you.

title: Shopify Expert: High-End UI/UX Refinement & Liquid Developer (Nike/On Aesthetic)
description:
?The Brand & Vision?

We are a performance-focused youth soccer footwear brand. Our mission is to dismantle barriers for "Unseen Talent" in sports. We aren't looking for a basic Shopify setup—we want a premium, high-impact visual identity that rivals global leaders like Nike, Adidas, and On-Running.



We are looking for a dedicated partner in the Philippines who can bridge the gap between world-class athletic design and clean, custom Liquid coding.



?Project & Compensation?

Total Project Budget: $1,000 USD (Fixed Price / Project-based).



Trial Phase: We begin with a Paid Trial Task for shortlisted candidates to ensure a match in design and coding standards.



Future Opportunity: Success in this project can lead to long-term maintenance and future feature development for our brand.



?What We Expect from You?

Aesthetic Excellence: You must have a portfolio that showcases a "Professional Sports" look—clean layouts, bold typography, and sophisticated white space.



Custom Liquid Mastery (Mandatory): All modifications must be hand-coded using Liquid, HTML, and CSS. We DO NOT use Page Builders (PageFly, Shogun, GemPages, etc.). If you rely on plugins for design, please do not apply.



Klaviyo Integration: Experience setting up Klaviyo flows with custom-coded Shopify themes is a huge plus.



Attention to Detail: You build mobile-first, lightning-fast sections that convert.



?The Selection Process?

Review: We will check your portfolio and ID Proof score.



Paid Trial: Shortlisted experts will be invited to redesign and custom-code a specific homepage section.



Hiring: Upon a successful trial, we will immediately move to the full store refinement.



?How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY?

Please start your application with the word "SOCCER" so I know you’ve read the requirements. Please provide:



- Your Portfolio & Resume: Please share links to your best work (specifically looking for sports, footwear, or premium aesthetics) and your CV.



- Custom Liquid Experience: Briefly describe your experience with custom Liquid coding. Have you ever built complex, bespoke Shopify sections from scratch?



- Availability: This is a comprehensive refinement project. Do you currently have the capacity to take on a $1k project over the next few weeks?



- Trial Agreement: Are you comfortable starting with a paid trial task to demonstrate your coding and design alignment?

title: FULL-TIME SALES & OPERATIONS ASSISTANT
description:
Company: Acland Property Services

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-Time – 8 Hours/Day, 5 Days/Week (Aligned with Australian AEST business hours)

Industry: Construction / Carpentry / Property Services

 

About Us

Acland Property Services is a Melbourne Australia based carpentry and property services company delivering high-quality residential and light commercial projects. We are growing and looking for a driven, organised, and confident Sales & Operations Assistant to help create/manage leads, schedule jobs, follow up quotes, and support business growth through admin tasks. 

This is a long-term full-time role for someone who wants stability, growth, and performance-based bonuses.

 

Role Overview

You will be the first point of contact for new enquiries and a key driver of sales growth. Your focus will be turning enquiries into booked site visits and confirmed jobs, while also supporting day-to-day admin and scheduling.

This is NOT a passive admin role. This is a results-driven sales support role.

 

Core Responsibilities

Lead Management & Sales (Primary Focus)

• Monitor and respond to new leads (HiPages, website,
, phone)

• Call all new enquiries within 5–10 minutes

• Qualify leads (budget, timeline, location, job scope)

• Book site visits into calendar

• Follow up all sent quotes (calls + SMS +
)

• Re-engage old leads and past clients

• Maintain and update CRM daily

• Track pipeline and report weekly numbers

 

Outbound & Business Development

Cold call:

- Real estate agents

- Property managers

- Builders & developers

- Body corporates

- Build and maintain contact lists

- Follow up potential referral partners monthly

- Identify new work opportunities online



Operations & Admin Support

• Managing CRM system

• Job updating

• Answer incoming calls professionally

• Manage shared calendar scheduling

• Prepare basic quote templates (final approval by director)

• Send invoices & payment reminders

• Request Google reviews after completed jobs

• Maintain organised file systems and job records

• Other admin works appointed by the management 

 

Key Performance Expectations (KPIs)

This role is performance-based. Minimum expectations:

• Generate and manage 10+ qualified leads per week

• 100% response to new leads

• All quotes followed up within 24–48 hours

• Calendar booked 1–2 weeks ahead

• Weekly KPI report submitted

• Consistent cold calling activity (minimum daily targets)

Bonuses available based on: your performance within 3 months 



Required Skills & Experience

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Confident and professional phone manner

• Previous experience in sales, appointment setting, or construction/trades preferred

• Strong organisational skills

• Experience using CRM or Google Workspace

• High attention to detail

• Self-motivated and proactive

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace

 

Employment Details

• Full-Time (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)

• Must overlap with Australian business hours (AEST)

• Long-term position – we are looking for someone who will grow with the company for many years to come and get to bigger positions within the company. 

• Monthly salary (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses available after probation period

 

Important: Who This Role Is NOT For

Do NOT apply if:

• You are uncomfortable making phone calls

• You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative

• You dislike sales targets or KPIs

• You are looking for short-term freelance work

 

Who We’re Looking For

We want someone:

• Hungry to grow with a business

• Comfortable speaking to Australian clients

• Driven by performance results

• Organised and structured

• Interested in long-term stability

 

How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes)

2. Your previous sales or appointment-setting experience

3. Internet speed test screenshot

4. The word “ACLPS” in your subject line

title: Motion Graphics Designer / Video Editor
description:
Remote | Contract to Full Time



About Us

We are a woman owned creative studio based in Los Angeles, California working with VTubers, streamers, content creators, and digital brands.



Our focus is building internet native media such as motion graphics, intro videos, creator branding, thumbnails, announcement videos, website visuals, and social media content.



We are a small but growing studio that values creativity, collaboration, and initiative. We are looking for someone who understands online culture, streaming content, and modern video trends and wants to grow with a team from the ground up.



This role will start as contract work so we can build a strong workflow together. The goal is to transition into a full time role with benefits as the company grows.



This is a fully remote position, but there may be opportunities in the future to collaborate internationally with creator agencies, animation studios, and content creators, including potential travel to Japan, Los Angeles, and other creative hubs for events and projects.



What You Will Be Creating

You will help creators build their visual identity and online presence.



Projects may include

• Motion graphics and animated intro videos using tools like After Effects

• Editing previous livestreams into polished content for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram

• Cutting stream highlights and clips for short form content

• Creator announcement videos and promotional trailers

• Eye catching thumbnails that match a creator’s theme

• Stream graphics, icons, and branding assets

• Website visuals and design elements

• Creative marketing clips and promotional content

• Occasional faceless UGC videos for sponsored campaigns



The focus is motion graphics and video editing, not frame by frame animation.



Responsibilities

• Create motion graphics and intro animations using After Effects or similar tools

• Edit long livestream recordings into engaging highlight videos and short form clips

• Follow current editing trends used by streamers and YouTube creators

• Design thumbnails, icons, and digital assets that match creator branding

• Collaborate with the Creative Lead while bringing your own creative ideas and direction to projects

• Take initiative to improve concepts and elevate project quality

• Organize project files and deliver clean editable assets



What We Are Looking For

• Experience with Adobe After Effects for motion graphics

• Video editing experience using Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar software

• Ability to turn livestream footage into engaging edited content

• Strong visual design sense and pacing for online content

• Understanding of internet culture, streaming, and social media video trends

• Reliable communication in a remote work environment

• Ability to manage creative projects and meet deadlines



Bonus Skills

• Experience with Photoshop, Premiere Pro, or Illustrator

• Understanding of popular editing styles used by streamers and gaming creators

• Familiarity with popular video games and gaming communities

• Thumbnail design experience for YouTube

• Basic website visual or UI design knowledge

• Motion branding or logo animation experience



Growth Opportunity

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the studio long term.



As the company expands, this role can grow into a Lead Creative position, helping guide future editors and designers on the team.



We believe in rewarding strong work and initiative. Tea
mbers may receive equipment upgrades, bonuses, or gifted gear based on growth, performance, and KPIs.



Work Setup

• Fully remote

• Contract work to start

• Opportunity to transition into full time employment with benefits

• Chill creative studio environment

• Opportunity to collaborate with creators and agencies around the world



Compensation

• Hourly rate $11 to $15 USD per hour depending on experience and portfolio

• Opportunity for pay increases based on performance and project growth



How to Apply

Please include the following with your application



• A link to your portfolio or motion graphics work

• Examples of stream edits, intro animations, or social media video content you have created

• A short answer to this question



Which YouTuber, VTuber, or streamer do you think has great editing and why?

title: SEO Consultant
description:
About Us:

MageMontreal is a dynamic e-commerce consulting firm dedicated to providing top-notch solutions to our clients. As we expand our team, we are seeking a talented SEO Specialist to join us. This role will focus on SEO strategy and execution for the MageMontreal website. We offer a competitive base salary, fully remote work, an international work atmosphere, and growth opportunities.



Job Description:

We are looking for an SEO Specialist who can help improve the visibility and organic traffic of the MageMontreal website. The ideal candidate has hands-on SEO experience and can implement practical SEO improvements, including technical SEO, on-page optimization, and keyword strategy.



This is a remote freelance position with an estimated commitment of around 10 hours per week, with the potential for long-term collaboration or full-time employment for the right candidate.



Responsibilities:

- Develop and implement SEO strategies for the MageMontreal website

- Perform keyword research and optimize existing pages

- Improve on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, internal linking, content optimization)

- Identify technical SEO issues and recommend improvements

- Use SEO tools such as SEMRush, Ahrefs, or similar to monitor performance

- Track rankings, traffic, and SEO performance and provide basic reports



Requirements:

- 2–4+ years of experience in SEO (agency or freelance)

- Hands-on experience with on-page and technical SEO

- Familiarity with SEO tools such as SEMRush, Ahrefs, or similar tools

- Ability to analyze SEO performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Ability to work with some overlap with EST timezone

- Good written communication in English



What’s In It for You:

- Fully remote position

- Flexible working hours

- Freelance contract (starting with around 10 hours per week)

- Potential to grow into a long-term or full-time role



If you enjoy improving websites through SEO and driving organic growth, we would love to hear from you!

title: Assistant Bookkeeper (Property Management)

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–3 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.

description:

This role is ideal for someone creative, proactive, and growth-oriented someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do, but brings ideas, takes initiative, and wants to grow in marketing.



If you’re strong in design, skilled in video editing, and comfortable using AI creative tools we’d love to meet you.



Primary Focus (Graphic Design & Creative Production)



• Create high-quality graphics for social media 
, Instagram, YouTube)

• Edit short-form and long-form videos

• Assist with managing
, Instagram, and YouTube accounts

• Schedule and publish content

• Support content planning and campaign execution

Required Skills & Experience

• Solid video editing experience

• Experience managing or supporting
, Instagram, and YouTube

Kling

Veo3

OpenArt

• Proactive brings ideas, not just execution

• Growth mindset and long-term oriented

Opportunity

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Job Title: DevOps Engineer

Salary: 3,000 - 4,000 USD

Working set-up: Remote

Working Shift: European Timezone



Position Overview

We are looking for a highly skilled DevOps Engineer with strong expertise in self-hosted Kubernetes, bare-metal server management, and self-hosted infrastructure. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining custom solutions, with a deep understanding of networking, TCP sockets, and system monitoring. This position requires a proactive individual who can investigate i
, troubleshoot issues, and ensure system reliability and performance.



Why This Role Is Exceptional

Work with cutting-edge technology and solve complex, impactful problems.

Join a passionate, highly skilled team where innovation thrives.

Opportunities for continuous learning and career advancement.

Make a real impact in a growing company that values creativity and expertise.



What You’ll do

Design, implement, and maintain self-hosted Kubernetes (K8s) clusters on bare-metal servers.

Manage and optimize self-hosted infrastructure (we do not use AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud).

Deploy and maintain Redis and MongoDB for high-performance applications.

Automate deployments and CI/CD pipelines using Bitbucket.

Monitor infrastructure using Grafana and other observability tools to ensure system stability.

Troubleshoot networking issues, optimize TCP sockets, and improve system performance.

Develop custom DevOps solutions using Python and GoLang (strong advantage).

Implement security best practices and manage Cloudflare configurations for performance and security.

Investigate i
, perform root cause analysis, and implement preventive measures.

Work closely with development teams to support deployment and infrastructure needs.



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with self-hosted Kubernetes and bare-metal server management.

Expertise in Redis and MongoDB administration and optimization.

Proficiency in scripting and automation using Python and GoLang (big advantage).

Bash scripts knowledge

Experience with Bitbucket pipelines for deployment automation.

Deep understanding of networking concepts, TCP sockets, and low-level system performance tuning.

Hands-on experience with self-hosted infrastructure, ensuring high availability and security.

Familiarity with Cloudflare for managing DNS, security, and traffic routing.

Experience in i
 investigation, troubleshooting, and system monitoring.

Strong knowledge of Grafana and other monitoring tools for tracking system health.

Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with container runtime internals and optimizing Kubernetes performance.

Knowledge of logging and tracing tools for distributed systems.

Strong security background in self-hosted environments.

Experience in writing infrastructure as code (IaC) solutions.



If you are passionate about DevOps, infrastructure, and building scalable and secure systems, we'd love to hear from you. Together, let’s redefine what’s possible. Your next big opportunity starts here!



For interested applicants, kindly answer this form:

title: eCommerce Business Manager
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Manager to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Manager is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Video Editor & Right-Hand Growth Manager
description:
We are an established beauty/health and wellness brand and a media growth agency with a high-performing team of 10, now looking for 2 hungry individuals. We don’t want a freelancer—we want a hungry, loyal and young Right-Hand who wants a stable role with massive performance upside.



If you have a drive to WIN and hit big bonuses after big bonuses based on your own performance, read on.



The Role: Two Jobs, One Goal



You will be doing both of these simultaneously from Day 1. We provide all materials and training—you just need to be fast to apply it and constantly update us with your progress.

We are training you to become an absolute Marketing, Editing, Scriptwriting, and Management MACHINE.



Content Specialist (Main Task)

- Pay: $15+ minimum per video + Generous Bonuses if the ad hits KPI (Winning Ads = Cash).

- Focus: High-converting Meta ads.

- Bonus points: Knowledge of Veo3, 11Labs, or AI creative tools.



Page Management & Growth

- Pay: Base Salary Retainer + Huge Performance Bonus .

- The Upside: We have creators hitting bonuses per 1M views when set up correctly. We have the proof and the examples to show you exactly how it’s done. (More than 1 Mil views for the month = Cash)

- The Team: You’ll be working alongside 10 other high-performers doing exactly this.



Our Non-Negotiables (Who You Are)

- The Vibe: You are easy to work with and a black hole for instructions—you listen once and execute.

- Hyper-Responsive: We do not want to beg you to reply. You are active, transparent, and provide daily updates.

- Hungry: You are likely in Uni or a recent Grad with a hard drive to grind for performance bonuses.

- Fast Learner: We teach you A–Z; you just need to be a sponge.



The Logistics

Stability: This is a long-term, stable role.

- Growth: Training you to be an overall marketing/editor/scriptwriting/manager machine increases your skills and retainer eventually.

- Salary: Base + Per Video + Bonuses on both page AND video edit (To be discussed in the interview).



How to Apply (Strictly No AI)

If you use AI to write your application, you’re out. We want to see your real personality and hunger. No questions asked.



Start your message with the word "Lemon" and include:

-
 &
:

- Portfolio Link: (Short-form ads/E-com/Beauty focus/Or whatever shows us your WORK ETHIC)

- The Drive Check: Why are you the Right-Hand man we are looking for? Tell us genuinely. We are pretty chill, just be yourself.

- The Secret Word: Hide the word "Passionfruit" somewhere in your message.



Note: If your portfolio is solid, we skip the samples and hop on a call immediately. We will contact you on
.

title: Remote estimating and quoting assistant. Water storage tank projects.
description:
Raven Tanks is looking for a reliable remote assistant to support our estimating and quoting team for new water storage tank projects. We design, supply and install large scale bolted panel water tanks used for fire protection, potable water storage and industrial infrastructure across Australia and internationally.



This role supports our sales and engineering team by helping prepare accurate quotes for new projects. You will be working with real construction tenders, client drawings and supplier pricing, so attention to detail and the ability to follow systems is critical.



What you will do



Review client drawings, specifications and RFQs

Prepare cost estimates using our internal templates and pricing systems

Assist with preparing formal quotation documents for clients

Contact suppliers to confirm current pricing and availability

Support the sales team with follow ups and basic admin tasks

Keep quote files organised and documented properly



What we are looking for



Excellent written and spoken English

Very strong attention to detail

Comfortable working with documents, drawings and spreadsheets

Confident using computers and learning new systems quickly

Reliable internet and availability during or close to Australian business hours

Experience in estimating, quoting, construction support, engineering admin or similar roles is highly valued



We are specifically looking for someone dependable who takes ownership of their work. Our projects involve real infrastructure and accuracy matters. This role suits someone organised, proactive and comfortable working with technical information.



Important



Do not send a resume.



Instead, record a short 1 to 2 minute video explaining your experience and why you believe you are a strong fit for this role.



Send the video via WhatsApp to:


Candidates who follow the instructions and clearly communicate their experience will be prioritised.



This is a fully remote position with flexible hours and the opportunity to grow with the company for the right person. We are looking for someone who can start immediately.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter – Base + Commission – Perfect English Required
description:
We are hiring a Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter to join our outbound sales team.



Your job will be to contact businesses in the United States, start conversations with decision makers, and book qualified appointments for our sales team.



This role is primarily outbound prospecting, including cold calling and follow-up communication with potential clients.



We are looking for someone who is confident speaking with U.S. business owners, highly professional, and extremely comfortable on the phone.



This is a base salary + commission position, so strong performers will earn significantly more.



This is a long-term role with opportunity for advancement as we continue to grow.



Responsibilities



Make outbound calls to businesses in the United States

Speak with business owners and decision makers

Introduce our services and generate interest

Qualify potential clients

Schedule appointments for our sales team

Maintain organized notes and lead tracking



Requirements



Excellent spoken and written English

Very clear communication and professional speaking ability

Comfortable making outbound calls and speaking with strangers

Strong confidence and persistence

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

Sales, SDR, appointment setting, or cold calling experience preferred



Applicants must be comfortable speaking with U.S. clients on the phone.



Compensation



Base salary (depending on experience)

Commission for every qualified appointment and closed deal

Long-term opportunity for strong performers



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit:



Your resume



A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) telling us:



Your experience with sales or outbound calls



Why you believe you would be great for this role



Why you are confident speaking with U.S. clients



Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Executive Assistant & Operations Coordinator (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote|Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Wholesale Outreach Support (Hospitality Focus)
description:
**Overview**



We are seeking a hands-on, execution-focused **Wholesale Outreach Specialist** to help build a predictable pipeline of opportunities within the **hotel and hospitality** sector. Our brand is a premium craft cookie company built for 
nts of celebration and indulgence.



In this role, you will own the top-of-funnel sales process: sourcing the right contacts, running multi-touch outreach campaigns, and teeing up warm conversations for the founder to close.



**Work Structure & Compensation**

**Hours:** Part-time (**20 hours per week**).

**Timezone:** Must be available to work within **Central Time (CST)**.



* **Requirement:** Candidates **must not have a concurrent full-time job** to ensure dedicated focus on our pipeline growth.

* **Environment:** Remote.



### **Key Responsibilities**



#### **1. Lead Sourcing & List Building**



* Identify and build targeted lead lists across boutique hotels, luxury concierge teams, and hotel management groups.

* Research and validate contact details for key decision-makers, including **Food & Beverage Directors** and **Guest Experience Managers**.

* Maintain clean, structured lead lists segmented by region, channel, and job title.



#### **2. Outreach & Pipeline Management**



* Execute personalized, multi-touch
 campaigns using a warm and premium tone.

* Manage daily replies: qualify interest, answer basic questions, and move the conversation forward.

* Track all activity and pipeline status in a CRM or structured Google Sheet to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

* Prepare "handoff briefs" for the founder, providing context on warm leads ready for closing calls.



#### **3. Reporting & Optimization**



* Provide weekly reporting with visual KPI tracking, including leads added, reply rates, and positive response rates.

* Identify what is working or failing and propose workflow changes to improve results.



---



### **Required Skills & Experience**



**Industry Expertise:** Proven experience with **hotel/hospitality outreach**, wholesale sales, or business development.

**Communication:** Strong written English skills with a warm, premium, and concise style.

**Technical Proficiency:** Comfortable building lead lists and running outbound campaigns end-to-end. Familiarity with **Apollo, HubSpot**, or similar prospecting and CRM tools is a plus.

**Attributes:** Extremely organized, high ownership, and fast execution speed.



**Advantageous:** Experience selling premium food, gifting, or amenities into hotels.



### **To Apply**



Please submit your resume along with a **Loom video** (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Policy Researcher
description: As a researcher at the Lee Kuan Yew School of Public Policy in Singapore, I am currently engaged in part-time academic research on South Asian international relations at a local institution. My research focuses on topics related to the Philippines, such as maritime security cooperation in the Indo-Pacific region, the implementation dynamics of ASEAN centrality, the interplay between domestic politics and foreign policy in the Philippines, the local impact of Japanese Official Development Assistance (ODA) projects in the southern Philippines, and the Philippines-U.S. alliance. I am seeking professional insights and analytical support from local experts in the Philippines.

title: Dental Virtual Assistant
description:
(Recalls & Patient Follow-Ups)



Part-Time to Start (Opportunity for More Hours) | Day Shift | Remote



We’re currently looking for a Dental Virtual Assistant to support one of our clients, a dental clinic based in Caroline Springs, Victoria, Australia.



This role will mainly focus on patient recalls and follow-ups. You’ll be helping the clinic reconnect with patients who are due for appointments and assisting them in booking their next visit.



The goal is simple: help patients stay on track with their dental care while keeping the clinic’s schedule full and organised.



This role is ideal for someone who is confident on the phone, organised, and comfortable speaking with patients.





Work Setup



This is a part-time role to start.



• Around 4 hours per day

• 2 to 3 days per week initially

• Weekdays only

• Work hours follow AEST (Australian Eastern Standard Time)

• This is a day shift role for Philippine time. No night shifts required.



The schedule may increase depending on workload and clinic needs.





What You’ll Be Doing



Your main focus will be working through the clinic’s recall list and helping bring patients back in for appointments.



Tasks include:



• Calling patients who are due for recall appointments

• Following up with patients who previously did not answer

• Helping patients schedule their next appointment

• Answering basic patient questions and assisting with booking requests

• Keeping records updated after each call or follow-up

• Reattempting contact when needed to improve response and booking rates



Over time, additional responsibilities may be added depending on clinic needs.



What We’re Looking For



• Clear and confident communication, especially when speaking with patients

• Friendly and professional on calls while still being able to guide patients toward booking their appointments

• Comfortable handling follow-ups and occasional patient questions

• Organised and able to keep track of recalls and patient responses

• Some dental or healthcare experience is a big plus

• Experience working with Australian clinics or patients is also helpful, but not required

• Familiarity with Dental4Windows (D4W) is a bonus, but we’re happy to provide training for the right person

• Someone proactive, reliable, and comfortable working independently



This role suits someone who is a strong communicator and confident closer, someone who can turn recall calls into confirmed appointments.







About Us



This role is hired through Virtual Colleague under the Shoutout Digital Group, an Australia-based digital marketing and support team working with clinics and businesses across the country.





How to Apply



If this sounds like a role you’d enjoy, please apply here:







We’ll review all applications and get in touch with shortlisted candidates for a short interview so we can get to know you better.

title: ECommerce Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – $10 Per Video – Korean Skincare Brand (Long-Term Role)



Minimum 4 video/week rest assured so minimum $160 monthly based salary|  can go higher when assigned more to you



Who we are looking for (ideally):

- hard working individual that is hungry and looking for a part time that can turn into full time





About Us:



We’re a fast-growing Korean skincare brand on a mission to help people achieve radiant, glass-like skin. Our products are gaining traction fast, and now we’re building a dream content team to match. If you’re passionate about beauty, storytelling, and eye-catching edits, you might be the perfect fit.



About the Role:



We’re looking for a Video Editor to join us on a long-term, per-video basis (starting at $10/video minimum + performance-based bonuses). You’ll be working on short-form content (15–120 seconds) designed for Meta platforms 
 & Instagram), with a focus on UGC, testimonials, and ad-style creatives. Work with voiceover softwares like 11labs for voice scripts as well as some graphic design occasionally of $5 per concept!



We mainly use CapCut and Canva, but you’re free to use whatever tools you’re most comfortable with — as long as the final product hits our quality and style benchmarks.



You’ll receive 5 example ads upfront so you can see exactly the style we expect. If you can match that energy, we’re ready to roll!



What We Expect From You:



- Edit compelling, scroll-stopping ad creatives using provided UGC clips and voiceovers. (We usually give reference for you to edit and follow so you can understand what we want initially then it can be really hands off to you)

- Understand the fundamentals of what makes a high-converting ad (We can teach and guide you!)

- Maintain a strong sense of pacing and emotional flow throughout each video.

- Deliver consistent brand voice and high attention to detail.

- Sourcing Organic Clips online (from Tiktok, Yt, IG as brolls)

- Handle revisions with 24–72 hr turnaround preferred



What Every Week Looks Like to you:



1. We’ll send you a Google Drive folder with raw B-roll footage.

2. We’ll provide MP4 reference ads, voiceover MP3s, and scripts in drive and google doc

3. You’ll receive 4+ projects per week to begin with minimum for $40 at least

4. We’ll gradually increase volume once we see solid results with you

5. Creatives that perform well (based on ad data) will be rewarded with generous bonuses — will discuss in the interview.



Requirements:



- Portfolio of ad-style videos (preferably in the beauty/skincare or lifestyle niche).

- Strong proficiency in CapCut and Canva (no need for Adobe unless that’s your preference).

- Ability to add subtitles, motion effects, and creative transitions.

- Clear communication and reliable delivery.

- Bonus: Graphic design or AI voiceover experience or AI graphic design for picture ads



---



How to Apply:



Please start your message with the word "Lemon" to confirm that you’ve read this job post in full. Then include the following:



Passionfruit

[ Your
 ]

[ Your
 ]

[ Portfolio Link ]

[ About You ]

Tell us genuinely why you want this role, what makes you a great fit, and why we should choose you, please write it down genuinely, dont use AI for help, we can differentiate easily



```



After reviewing your application, we’ll send you a few sample ads so you can show us what you can do. If the results are solid, we’ll move forward with ongoing, long-term collaboration. BUT if your portfolio looks good, we can hop on a call immediately



Looking forward to seeing your creativity in action!
