title: Junior Quantity Surveyor / Construction Plan Analyst
description:
About the Company



MeasureUp Flooring Ltd is a commercial flooring contractor based in New Zealand. We work on a wide range of projects including:

• Hospitals

• Schools

• Retirement villages

• Commercial buildings

• Residential homes



Our work includes the supply and installation of:

• Carpet

• Vinyl flooring

• Timber and laminate flooring

• Floor preparation systems

• Acoustic wall products



We are looking for a Junior Quantity Surveyor / Construction Plan Analyst to support our Quantity Surveying team by organising project documentation, reviewing drawings, and preparing estimating information.



This is a long-term position for someone who enjoys working with construction drawings and technical information.



Role Overview

This role supports our estimating and quantity surveying team by preparing project information so quotations and tenders can be completed efficiently.

You will analyse drawings, organise project documents, prepare estimating diagrams, and assist with pricing preparation.



Key Responsibilities

Project Setup

• Create and organise projects in our CRM system

• Upload drawings and specifications

• Label plan sheets clearly

• Ensure correct drawing revisions are used

• Organise documents for easy access



Plan & Specification Review

Review architectural drawings and construction specifications to identify:

• Floor finish schedules

• Wall finish schedules

• Flooring materials and products

• Installation notes

• Floor preparation requirements

• Transition details and accessories



You will highlight relevant information for the Quantity Surveying team.

Estimating Preparation

Prepare drawings ready for estimating using our software.



Tasks include:

• Loading drawings into MeasureSquare M8

• Scaling plans accurately

• Drawing room areas

• Labelling rooms

• Identifying flooring types

• Preparing diagrams ready for QS pricing



Domestic Project Quoting Support

You will also assist with residential flooring quotations once site measurements have been completed by our team.

Tasks include:

• Loading site measurement drawings into MeasureSquare

• Drawing the floor layout in M8

• Assigning flooring selections

• Checking room sizes and areas

• Preparing quantities

• Preparing draft quotations ready for final review



Product & Supplier Research

Assist the QS team with product information and pricing.

Tasks may include:

• Identifying flooring products from specifications

• Checking supplier product details

• Recording supplier pricing

• Maintaining product and pricing information



Additional Business Tasks

From time to time you may assist with other processing tasks including:

• organising project documentation

• maintaining product price lists

• supplier research

• preparing reports or spreadsheets

• data organisation within our systems



Software Used

You will be trained to use:

• MeasureSquare M8 estimating software

• Company CRM system

• Microsoft Excel

• PDF drawing tools

Experience with construction estimating or take-off software is highly beneficial.



Preferred Background

Applicants with experience or education in the following areas are strongly preferred:

• Quantity Surveying

• Construction Estimating

• Architecture

• Civil Engineering

• CAD Drafting



Experience reading architectural drawings and construction specifications is important for this role.

MeasureSquare M8 Experience

Our team uses MeasureSquare M8 to prepare flooring take-offs and diagrams.

Typical tasks include:

• Loading plans into M8

• Scaling drawings

• Drawing room areas

• Assigning flooring products

• Preparing diagrams ready for pricing



Applicants with experience in MeasureSquare, PlanSwift, Bluebeam, AutoCAD or similar estimating software will be strongly preferred

Training can be provided if you have similar experience.



Working Hours

This role requires availability during New Zealand working hours.

Schedule:

• 5 hours per day

• Monday to Friday

• Must be available during NZ daytime hours

This role may increase to more hours as the position develops.



Pay

$5 – $8 USD per hour depending on experience.



How to Apply

Please include:

Your resume

A short introduction about your experience. 



Important

To confirm you have read the full job description, please begin your application with the word:

MEASUREUP



Applications that do not include this word may not be reviewed.

title: Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager (D2C E-commerce Coffee Brand) *Full Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. Seeking a Marketing Manager to own campaigns, launches, and cross-channel execution alongside founders.





ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand redefining how coffee is experienced. We are shaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design and invent one-of-a-kind tools that didn’t exist before — tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for a Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager to take ownership of how our work is brought to life across channels.



You won’t just publish content.



You’ll help shape how new products are introduced, how campaigns are structured, and how our global community experiences our brand — while ensuring execution remains disciplined, consistent, and scalable.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is a senior marketing operator role. Execution is central — but it is not a junior content posting role.



You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time



You will see early product prototypes.

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Plan and manage content calendars aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure consistent publishing and follow-through across platforms.

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Support and execute seasonal campaigns, product launches, collaborations, and promotional initiatives.

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Coordinate creative asset development across designers, freelancers, and AI-supported workflows.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

• Strengthen campaign structure and rollout processes over time.



You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

• Maintain high standards of aesthetic consistency, messaging clarity, and brand voice integrity across both human and AI-assisted workflows.

• Draft copy or guide AI-assisted content creation when needed, ensuring outputs remain on-brand and high quality.

• Review creative outputs for brand alignment before escalation to the Marketing Lead.

• Collaborate comfortably in tools such as Figma or similar platforms to support execution and alignment.



You don’t need to be a designer — but you should have strong creative judgment.



(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Identify opportunities to refine workflows and strengthen how our marketing engine operates.

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.



As you demonstrate reliability and judgment, your scope expands meaningfully.





What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Campaigns are rolled out in a coordinated, cross-channel manner without last-minute chaos.

• Creative briefs are structured, clear, and reduce friction across collaborators.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

• Early experiments in new channels or initiatives are tested in a structured way.



Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• 4–6+ years of experience managing marketing and/or social for a brand.

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Highly detail-oriented and disciplined in follow-through.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

• Comfort collaborating in design tools such as Figma.

• Comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team.



Big pluses:

• Experience supporting product launches or crowdfunding campaigns.

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design, positioning, and global campaigns.

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Have real ownership inside a small, high-performing team where your work is visible and impactful.

• Help shape coffee culture around the world.



We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

• Your ideas are heard.

• Your execution matters.

• Your scope can grow with your capability.

You will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

Full time: 40 hours/week 

Compensation range: $1,100-$1,800 (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)

Up to 16 days of paid time off annually

Asia time zone working hours required







HOW TO APPLY

Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process extremely efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Part-Time Meta Ads Operator (Execution Focused)
description:
About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part?time and want a long?term core client, not just a one?off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Email Marketing & Launch Copywriter
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing education company serving experienced software engineers who want real-world Rust skills and real career outcomes. Our flagship offers are mentor-led, cohort-based programs focused on shipping production-grade projects and landing Rust-heavy roles.



 is one of our main revenue channels. We use it to fill cohorts, book sales calls, and reactivate our warm audience. We’re hiring someone to own this function end-to-end.



Role Overview

You will own the strategy, copy, and execution of
 campaigns that drive launches, bookings, reactivations, and long-term revenue from our list. This is a senior, full-time role for someone who wants clear ownership, measurable impact, and a long-term seat on the team.



You are not “writing some
s.” You are building a repeatable
 machine that keeps our calendar full and our cohorts sold out.



What You’ll Own

1. Launch Campaigns (Cohorts & Fast-Cash Promos)

Plan and write complete launch sequences for our cohorts and promo offers (pre-launch, open cart, objections, FAQ, deadline, last call, sold-out, etc.).

Standardize, document, and templatize launches so they’re easy to clone and improve.



2. Evergreen Nurture & Segmentation

Build and maintain evergreen sequences that warm new subscribers and move them toward a call or application.

Segment based on behavior and stage (new leads, engaged, inactive, past applicants, buyers) so people get the right messages at the right time.



3. Show-Up & No-Show Sequences

Write and optimize sequences that increase show-up rates for booked calls.

Create follow-up for no-shows and no-buys to recover missed revenue and keep good leads in motion.



4. Reactivation Campaigns

Run quarterly reactivation campaigns for cold or inactive subscribers to generate “found” revenue from the list.



What Success Looks Like in the First 90 Days

- 3 complete launch sequences live, documented, and reusable.

- 1 evergreen nurture sequence live, for new leads.

- Show-up rate on
-sourced calls improved vs. baseline.

- At least 1 reactivation campaign shipped with clear revenue attribution.

- Clear
 playbook (templates, frameworks, naming) the team can understand and reuse.



Requirements

- 3+ years professional B2C
 copy experience.

- Proven track record owning full launch/email sequences (not just individual
s).

- Strong understanding of offer positioning, sequencing, and deadlines for high-ticket educational or coaching products.

- Ability to write in a clear, human voice that resonates with senior, technical audiences.

- Comfortable with at least 3-hour overlap with US pacific time zone, async with a distributed team, and being accountable to numbers (revenue, bookings, show rates).



Bonus

- Experience with technical or software developer audiences.

- Familiarity with platforms like Kartra, ActiveCampaign, or similar.

- Comfortable pulling basic numbers from dashboards/CRMs to see what’s working.



How to Apply

In your application, include:

- A brief personal intro (2–5 short sentences) in your own words.

- 1–2 examples of launch or promo sequences you’ve written (cohort, course, or high-ticket offers).

- A short note explaining how you approach writing launch
s for a high-ticket cohort program.

- Your monthly salary expectation in USD (full-time) and your official
 address.



Application Question (Required):

1. Which part of the
 lifecycle do you enjoy owning most? (launches, nurture, reactivation, post-purchase, etc.) What
 platforms have you worked in?

2. Briefly describe one launch
 sequence you’ve owned end-to-end.

3. In 5–7 bullet points, outline:

- the audience

- the goal of the sequence

- how you structured the sequence (early ? middle ? final
s)

- one decision you made to avoid audience fatigue



Applications that skip any of the above will not be considered.

title: Website UX / UI & CX Designer
description:
Job description



One of our key projects involves revamping an existing website that currently performs well in SEO but has usability, navigation, and design challenges.



We’re looking for an experienced UX/UI & CX Designer who can analyze, plan, and redesign the website while ensuring a smooth, user-friendly, and conversion-driven experience.



?



Project Goals

 • Improve usability and navigation so users can easily find what they need.

 • Modernize the visual design while keeping it clean, responsive, and brand-aligned.

 • Optimize the customer journey to improve conversions and engagement.

 • Preserve and, where possible, enhance the existing SEO performance.

 • Align content, design, and storytelling to communicate our brand vision clearly.



?



Your Role



As our UX/UI & CX Designer, you will:

 • Audit the current website’s usability, navigation, and user flows.

 • Understand business goals and the story we want to tell.

 • Create wireframes, sitemaps, and prototypes to map out an improved structure.

 • Design modern, responsive, and visually appealing interfaces.

 • Collaborate with our SEO specialist to ensure rankings and structure are preserved.

 • Provide input on content placement and assist in optimizing messaging for clarity and impact.

 • Work closely with our developers to ensure a seamless handoff and accurate implementation.



?



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for a senior profile with already many years & projects of experience.



Must-have skills & experience:

 • Proven experience in UX/UI design for websites.

 • Strong understanding of customer experience (CX) and user journeys.

 • Experience conducting usability audits and improving website structure.

 • Ability to design modern, responsive, and accessible interfaces.

 • Familiarity with SEO best practices when redesigning websites.

 • Excellent communication skills to work with developers, and content writers.



Nice-to-have skills:

 • Experience working with content strategists or managing website content planning.

 • Knowledge of conversion rate optimization (CRO) techniques.



?



Deliverables

 • Usability and navigation audit.

 • Updated site structure and content hierarchy.

 • Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups.

 • Final design prototypes for developer handoff.

 • Optional: Guidance on content placement and CX optimization.



?



This is a collaborative role — we value proactive communication and transparency throughout the process.

title: Business Development Associate
description:
About the Role:



The Business Development Associate supports the agency’s growth by identifying, connecting with, and securing new brand/s partnerships. This role is pivotal in expanding our client/s amenities program, driving brand visibility through strategic placements, maintaining strong client relationships and providing day-to-day partnership support across other business units. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and has a passion for connecting brands with meaningful opportunities.



Key Responsibilities:



Prospecting & Client Acquisition

- Generate and maintain a monthly list of potential brand partners, supported with a PowerPoint deck highlighting key details and visuals for each prospect.

- Identify opportunities for new business growth, including unpaid product placements to boost brand awareness.

- Connect with prospects, pitch partnership opportunities and negotiate deals in line with brand-approved lists.

- Collaborate daily with other business units to identify, develop and execute partnership opportunities that align with agency and client objectives.



Client Relationship Management

- Track, retain and nurture active clients to ensure ongoing satisfaction and partnership longevity.

- Maintain up-to-date records of client engagements, including deals closed, pipeline progress and follow-ups.

- Provide day-to-day support to cross-functional teams by facilitating partner communications, coordinating deliverables and ensuring partnerships add value to multiple business units.



Reporting & Performance Tracking

- Produce monthly monitoring reports summarizing prospecting, client retention and partnership outcomes.

- Provide insights and recommendations for improving outreach, partnership activation and brand visibility initiatives.

- Collaborate with other units on reporting as needed to inform agency-wide partnership strategies.



Qualifications & Skills

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.

- 1–3 years of experience in business development, client management or brand partnerships (agency experience preferred).

- Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills; confident in client-facing roles.

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational and reporting skills.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office/Google Suite



Job Types: Full-time, Permanent



Benefits:

- Company Christmas gift

- Company events

- Opportunities for promotion

- Paid training

- Promotion to permanent employee

- Work from home



Work Location: Hybrid remote in Makati City

title: Public Relations Associate
description:
Overview:



As Public Relations Associate, you will play a supporting role in managing client accounts and executing strategic plans to meet client objectives. You will work closely with accounts managers and other team members to ensure the successful delivery of client campaigns and projects.



Responsibilities:



ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT

- Precise Internal Brand Allocations Management: Ensure the accurate and goal-driven management of the internal Brand Allocations Tab to optimize resource allocation and brand effectiveness.

- Active Support in Creative Ideation and Agency Revert/Pitch Development: Contribute to creative ideation and the elaboration of agency reverts/pitches to secure successful project proposals and campaign implementations.

- Strategic Support in Campaign Strategy Development: Assist in the creation of a comprehensive campaign strategy to achieve campaign goals and objectives.

- Effective Support in Agency Revert/Pitch Presentation: Researches and compiles data for deck content. Assists with deck formatting and design, adhering to brand guidelines

- Collaborative Support in Seeding Kit Management and Ideation: Contribute to the management and ideation of seeding kits to maximize their impact in promotional efforts and campaign success.

- Resourceful Support in Supplier Management: Assist in closing agreements with Seeding Kit suppliers and other 3rd party suppliers as needed to ensure the availability of essential resources for campaign execution.

- Supportive Coordination of Seeding Kit Rendering: Collaborate in the coordination of Seeding Kit renders, ensuring they align with the campaign's creative direction and objectives.

- Contribute to Comprehensive Content Toolkit Creation: Participate in the creation of an overall content toolkit, providing a comprehensive set of resources to support campaign initiatives.

- Active Involvement in PLE Creation: Supports in data collection and organization for post-launch evaluation reports, assisting with data analysis and visualization.



BRAND AND CLIENT RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT

- Timely Brand Team Communication: Prioritize swift and effective responses to the brand team's inquiries to ensure efficient brand management and collaboration.

- Customized Client Support for Campaign Success: Provide tailored support for client needs related to campaign-specific requests, offering flexible assistance to meet campaign objectives.

- Precise Meeting Minutes Documentation: Lead the accurate and comprehensive recording of meeting minutes, ensuring that crucial discussions and decisions are well-documented for clear follow-up and accountability.

- Participate in client meetings and contribute insights to support account management efforts. 



KOL RELATIONS

- Strategic KOL Management and Engagement: Implement a comprehensive strategy for the management and engagement of Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) to achieve specific campaign objectives and performance metrics.

- Responsive Brand Inquiry Handling: Ensure timely and comprehensive responses to brand inquiries across various platforms (WhatsApp, Viber,
, etc) to enhance brand engagement and customer satisfaction.

- Proactive KOL Outreach and Message Crafting: Initiate proactive outreach to KOLs and create persuasive and tailored reach-out messages to secure their participation in campaigns.

- Effective KOL Partnership Closing: Successfully close KOL partnerships by securing all essential details needed for campaign collaboration.

- KOL MOA Precision: Lead the creation of KOL Memorandums of Agreement (MOAs) to establish clear and mutually beneficial terms for collaborations.

- Rigorous KOL Content Quality Assurance: Implement rigorous checks to maintain the quality of KOL-generated content, ensuring it aligns with brand standards and campaign objectives.

- Thorough Campaign Details and Toolkit Dissemination: Cascade all campaign details and toolkits comprehensively throughout the team to ensure everyone is well-informed and equipped for campaign success.

- Long-term KOL Relationship Building: Focus on nurturing and sustaining long-term KOL relationships to drive continued advocacy and support for the brand, fostering enduring partnerships.



EVENT MANAGEMENT

- Efficient Coordination of Event Suppliers and Information Cascade: Play a key role in optimizing event supplier coordination and effectively disseminating information across the team to ensure resource allocation aligns with event objectives.

- Active Involvement in Event Conceptualization and Strategy: Contribute to the development of a clear and goal-driven event conceptualization and strategy to ensure successful event execution and the achievement of objectives.

- Resourceful Support in Supplier Coordination and Sourcing: Assist in the efficient coordination and sourcing of event suppliers to ensure the acquisition of necessary resources, promoting cost-effective and high-quality event solutions.

- Collaborative Support in Event Day Operations: Participate actively in managing event day operations to ensure a smooth and successful execution of the event, in line with the predefined strategy and goals.



Benefits:

- Company Christmas gift

- Company events

- Opportunities for promotion

- Paid training

- Promotion to permanent employee

- Work from home



Work Location: Hybrid remote in Makati City

title: GoHighLevel SaaS Automation & Implementation Specialist
description:
We're Nexuscai — an AI voice infrastructure company that builds automated 

communication systems for service-based businesses using GoHighLevel, 

voice AI agents, and custom integrations.



We're hiring someone who lives and breathes GoHighLevel. You know the 

platform inside and out — the architecture, the logic, the quirks, and 

the shortcuts. You've built complex client systems before, you've handled 

large builds solo, and you don't need to be walked through it. You just 

get it done.



This is not a VA role. This is a technical implementation role for someone 

who thinks like a builder and operates like an owner.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Own full GoHighLevel sub-account builds from scratch: domain/DNS setup, 

  domain transfers, calendar configuration, pipelines, custom fields, 

  tags, smart lists, and user permissions

- Design and build complex workflow automations and pipeline logic — 

  multi-step, conditional, trigger-based — for client onboarding, lead 

  nurturing, appointment booking, follow-up sequences, and reactivation 

  campaigns

- Troubleshoot GoHighLevel systems fast — broken automations, misfiring 

  triggers, webhook failures, integration issues — you diagnose and fix 

  without needing to escalate

- Build and optimize GoHighLevel as a SaaS platform: understand the SaaS 

  mode architecture, rebilling, sub-account management, and how to 

  configure GHL for agency delivery at scale

- Integrate third-party apps into GHL via native integrations, API, and 

  webhooks — Twilio, Stripe, Google Calendar, and custom tools

- Use Make.com to extend GHL's capabilities: build automation scenarios, 

  parse webhooks, connect external APIs, handle data transformation

- Write clean code when needed (JavaScript, Python, or similar) to handle 

  custom logic, API calls, or data manipulation

- Handle domain transfers and DNS configuration confidently — A records, 

  CNAME, MX, TXT — without needing step-by-step guidance

- Write SOPs for every build so systems are documented, repeatable, and 

  handoff-ready

- Communicate directly with clients when needed — professionally and 

  clearly



REQUIREMENTS:

- Deep, hands-on GoHighLevel expertise — you understand the full system 

  architecture, not just surface-level setup

- Proven experience with complex GoHighLevel builds for multiple clients — 

  workflows, automations, SaaS mode, snapshots, pipelines

- Strong understanding of the GHL SaaS model: how to build, configure, 

  and optimize it for agency use

- Experience with domain transfers and DNS management

- Make.com proficiency: multi-step scenarios, webhooks, error handling, 

  API connections

- Coding ability: JavaScript, Python, or similar — comfortable writing 

  custom logic and API integrations

- REST API and webhook fluency: OAuth, API keys, payload debugging

- Solutions-first mindset — you think on your feet, come up with fixes 

  on the spot, and never present a problem without a solution attached

- Experience handling large, complex client builds independently — no 

  hand-holding required

- SOP writing and documentation experience (provide examples)

- Fluent English — spoken and written, professional enough for client calls

- Fast communicator: responds within 2 hours, proactive with updates



NICE TO HAVE:

- Voice AI agent experience (Retell AI, VAPI, ElevenLabs + Twilio)

- n8n experience

- Experience with service-based businesses (HVAC, roofing, medical spas, 

  plumbing, crane services)



TO APPLY:

Send a 1–2 minute Loom video showing:

1. A complex GoHighLevel workflow or automation you built solo

2. How you've handled a broken system or integration mid-build

3. An SOP or documentation example (blur client names if needed)



Tell us: What's the most complex GHL build you've completed, and what 

made it challenging?



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant / Customer Support / Email Support
description:

title: Are You a Rock Star Marketing + Design Executive?
description:
A fantastic opportunity has become available for a talented Marketing & Design Executive to join People Pillar remotely from the Philippines on a full-time contract.

You’ll support our UK-based HR consultancy by designing and delivering marketing that’s smart, consistent, and on-brand. You’ll receive briefs from our team across everything from market research and campaign planning to content creation and execution.

You’ll be confident using Canva (essential), comfortable with other design and editing tools, and happy working across common marketing platforms (including LinkedIn). You’ll have strong written and spoken English, a stable internet connection, and the ability to deliver high-quality work to deadlines.

Key Responsibilities & Accountabilities

• Market research: competitor and market analysis, identifying opportunities, gaps, and content angles

• Copywriting + creative: write clear, engaging marketing copy and create matching visuals

• Design delivery: create new and original designs and marketing assets from scratch ( using a brief) 

• Produce a wide variety of collateral, including:

o Banners and branded graphics

o Flyers and posters

o Workbooks and PDFs

o Social media posts and templates

o Marketing
s and simple
 layouts

• Photo/video editing: basic editing to support campaigns and social content

• Campaign execution: help manage and publish content across website, social media, and offline channels (as needed)

• Online Event Set-up : support planning and delivery 

• Ad hoc projects: jump in where needed to keep marketing moving

• Manage your time to ensure deadlines are met and quality stays consistently high

• Create and maintain organised files for all creative assets so everything can be found easily

• Understand the why behind each project so you can add value beyond “making it look good”

Tools & Skills You’ll Need

• Strong Canva skills (required)

• Comfortable with other design/editing apps (for example Adobe tools, CapCut, or similar)

• Confident copywriting skills in English (tone-aware, clear, and audience-focused)

• Familiarity with LinkedIn and common marketing platforms

• Excellent attention to detail and a strong eye for brand consistency

• Reliable, stable internet connection suitable for remote work

Personal Characteristics Required

• Driven and proactive

• Highly organised

• Meticulous attention to detail

• Creative and solutions-focused

• Able to plan effectively and meet deadlines

• Effective problem solver, motivated to deliver high-quality results

• At least 3 years of relevant experience in marketing execution, content creation, design, or similar

You’ll always start with the why, embrace a collaborative team environment, and pursue growth and learning every single day. 

We think big, never let our teammates down, and we celebrate the wins.

Working Hours & Availability

This is a full-time contract role, working remotely from your home in the Philippines.

You can choose your working hours for flexibility (we understand there’s a time difference). However, you must be online and available between 10:30 am – 4:30 pm GMT for team communication.

Why This Role?

This is a brilliant job for someone who actually gives a damn, a chance to make a real impact and contribute to something bigger than yourself. There’s also a significant opportunity to grow your skills across marketing strategy, execution, and creative.

How to Apply

To be considered as a serious candidate, please send:

• A short cover letter

• Your portfolio (or links to examples of your work)

IMPORTANT: In your cover letter, please tell us your favourite colour. (It’s how we can tell you’ve read the job description!)

The Application Process

If successful, the next stage of the process involves answering a few short questions so we can better understand you. You will also be asked to complete a small piece of sample work to help us accurately judge your marketing, copy, and design skills.

IMPORTANT: Any sample work you create is purely to judge your skills and will not be used for commercial purposes.

title: Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager (D2C E-commerce Coffee Brand) *Full Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. Seeking a Marketing Manager to own campaigns, launches, and cross-channel execution alongside founders.





ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand redefining how coffee is experienced. We are shaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design and invent one-of-a-kind tools that didn’t exist before — tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for a Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager to take ownership of how our work is brought to life across channels.



You won’t just publish content.



You’ll help shape how new products are introduced, how campaigns are structured, and how our global community experiences our brand — while ensuring execution remains disciplined, consistent, and scalable.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is a senior marketing operator role. Execution is central — but it is not a junior content posting role.



You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time



You will see early product prototypes.

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Plan and manage content calendars aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure consistent publishing and follow-through across platforms.

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Support and execute seasonal campaigns, product launches, collaborations, and promotional initiatives.

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Coordinate creative asset development across designers, freelancers, and AI-supported workflows.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

• Strengthen campaign structure and rollout processes over time.



You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

• Maintain high standards of aesthetic consistency, messaging clarity, and brand voice integrity across both human and AI-assisted workflows.

• Draft copy or guide AI-assisted content creation when needed, ensuring outputs remain on-brand and high quality.

• Review creative outputs for brand alignment before escalation to the Marketing Lead.

• Collaborate comfortably in tools such as Figma or similar platforms to support execution and alignment.



You don’t need to be a designer — but you should have strong creative judgment.



(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Identify opportunities to refine workflows and strengthen how our marketing engine operates.

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.



As you demonstrate reliability and judgment, your scope expands meaningfully.





What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Campaigns are rolled out in a coordinated, cross-channel manner without last-minute chaos.

• Creative briefs are structured, clear, and reduce friction across collaborators.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

• Early experiments in new channels or initiatives are tested in a structured way.



Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• 4–6+ years of experience managing marketing and/or social for a brand.

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Highly detail-oriented and disciplined in follow-through.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

• Comfort collaborating in design tools such as Figma.

• Comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team.



Big pluses:

• Experience supporting product launches or crowdfunding campaigns.

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design, positioning, and global campaigns.

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Have real ownership inside a small, high-performing team where your work is visible and impactful.

• Help shape coffee culture around the world.



We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

• Your ideas are heard.

• Your execution matters.

• Your scope can grow with your capability.

You will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

Full time: 40 hours/week 

Compensation range: $1,100-$1,800 (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)

Up to 16 days of paid time off annually

Asia time zone working hours required







HOW TO APPLY

Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process extremely efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Executive Assistant & Operations Coordinator (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote|Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Accounting Associate
description:
Location: Timog Avenue, Quezon City

Employment Type: Full-Time, 5 working days



Job Summary:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Accounting Associate to manage day-to-day financial transactions, including accounts receivable, accounts payable, bookkeeping, and cash flow monitoring. This role supports multi-branch operations and ensures accurate and timely financial records.



Key Responsibilities:

Record daily sales and monitor collections (Accounts Receivable)

Process supplier invoices and schedule payments (Accounts Payable)

Maintain accurate income and expense records in QuickBooks

Perform bank, cash, and sales reconciliations

Monitor weekly cash flow and assist in budgeting

Prepare basic financial reports (Sales, Expenses, Profit & Loss)

Ensure proper documentation and organized financial records

Coordinate with operations team for inventory and expense tracking



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

1–3 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience (F&B experience is a plus)

Proficient in QuickBooks and Excel / Google Sheets

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Able to work in a fast-paced, multi-branch environment



Why Join Us?

Growing restaurant brand with expanding locations

Hands-on role with real impact on business operations

Supportive and collaborative team environment

title: IT Business Analyst
description:
About the role

Join our dynamic team at Rising Tide Digital, Inc. as an IT Business Analyst. In this full-time role based in Taguig City, Metro Manila, you will play a crucial part in aligning our technology solutions with the strategic objectives of the business. As an expert in bridging the gap between IT and business requirements, you will work closely with stakeholders to identify opportunities for improvement and drive digital transformation initiatives.



What you'll be doing

Elicit, analyse and document business requirements to ensure IT solutions meet organisational needs

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, test and implement new systems and processes

Translate complex technical information into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders

Develop data models, process flows and other artefacts to support the delivery of IT projects

Monitor and evaluate the performance of IT systems, identifying areas for optimisation

Provide guidance and mentorship to junior team members



What we're looking for

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related field

Minimum 4 years' experience as an IT Business Analyst or in a similar role

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to think strategically

Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities

Proficiency in business analysis tools and techniques, such as user stories, use cases and process mapping

Experience working in an Agile/Scrum environment is highly desirable

title: Cold Email Outreach Operator
description:
Role Overview



This role is responsible for managing the agency's cold
 outreach system and ensuring campaigns run consistently and safely across multiple sending domains and inboxes.



The objective is to generate qualified sales conversations through well-managed outreach campaigns while maintaining strong deliverability and sender reputation.



This role combines technical campaign management with daily monitoring of outreach performance.



Candidates must be able to work with 3–4 hours of daily overlap during U.S. Eastern Time (EST) to coordinate with the internal team.



Core Responsibilities

 Infrastructure Management



• Maintain sending domains and
 inboxes used for outreach

• Monitor sender reputation and inbox health

• Ensure campaigns follow safe sending practices

• Manage inbox warm-up and domain rotation when required



Campaign Operations



• Set up and manage cold
 campaigns using tools such as Instantly or similar platforms

• Upload and organize prospect lists for campaigns

• Schedule sending volumes across multiple inboxes

• Monitor campaigns daily to ensure campaigns are operating correctly



Reply Monitoring



• Monitor responses from outreach campaigns

• Tag responses appropriately (interested, not interested, follow-up later, unsubscribe)

• Escalate positive responses to the sales team for follow-up



Campaign Performance



• Track campaign metrics such as open rates, reply rates, and positive responses

• Identify campaigns that require adjustments

• Suggest improvements to subject lines or campaign structure



Data Quality



• Review prospect lists before campaigns launch

• Ensure clean and accurate data is used in campaigns

• Identify issues with targeting or list quality



Profile Fit



This role suits someone who enjoys managing systems, paying attention to details, and improving campaign performance over time.



The ideal candidate is organized, technically comfortable with outreach tools, and disciplined in following structured processes.



Experience with cold
 platforms and outreach automation tools is preferred.

To apply, please include the following in your application:



1?? Your LinkedIn profile link



2?? The cold
 tools you have used (Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, Mailshake, etc.)



3?? Answer this question:



If a cold
 campaign suddenly drops from a 50% open rate to 15%, what are the first two things you would check?

title: Remote MYOB Bookkeeper & Operations VA - Sydney Pizza Shop
description:
Solo owner of a busy Sydney pizza franchise store. Need an experienced MYOB specialist to verify/optimize automated invoices (via new EzzyBills integration), handle weekly payroll/prep, provide real financial visibility (P&L trends, costs vs. revenue), chase suppliers/accountant, build simple processes/dashboards, and support local growth outreach. Remote, part-time ~20 hours/week (Australian hours overlap required).



MYOB & EzzyBills Verification



Review/fix auto-imported bills in MYOB, correct errors or mismatches.

Enter any non-auto items, reconcile bank/POS to bills (handle credits, wrong invoice numbers, mispayments).

Liaise with accountant on MYOB issues (share reports, clarify entries).



Payroll & Payments Prep

Track supplier invoices, prepare payment lists/schedules (owner approves and executes all payments).



Financial Visibility & Reporting

Build simple dashboards/tools (Google Sheets + MYOB exports) for weekly/monthly insights: revenue vs. costs, margins, expense trends.

Prepare monthly P&L with commentary; weekly summary reports + DSR compilation.

Monitor cashflow and flag issues (e.g., rising costs).



Compliance & Reminders

Set reminders for ATO deadlines (BAS/GST, super obligations).

Support payroll and small business compliance.



Processes & Local Growth

Document internal shop processes/SOPs (based on owner input) for operations and finance clarity.

Local marketing support: Schedule/share approved brand posts in
 groups (on permitted days/times); research and reach out to local schools (P&Cs), businesses for catering opportunities (draft
s, follow-ups).

Chase franchise HQ for store-specific marketing or support items as needed.





Requirements – Must-Haves



Proven experience with MYOB Business (Connected Ledger with Payroll preferred; recent Australian clients).

Hospitality/food/franchise background (especially P&Ls, cost tracking, process documentation).

Strong knowledge of Australian small business compliance (GST, BAS, STP, superannuation, PAYG).

2+ years as bookkeeper/VA hybrid; clear English for accountant liaison and professional outreach.

Proficient in Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive), Outlook, MYOB.

Bonus: Experience with EzzyBills or similar invoice automation; marketing/outreach skills.

Proactive, detail-oriented, trustworthy; reliable internet and availability during Sydney business hours.



What We Offer



Rate: ?196 per hour-?370 per hour

~20 hours/week to start; supportive environment with clear guidelines and regular check-ins (Zoom)

- Small business - opportunity to be a part of something new and add your own touch. 



Screening questions (please answer as part of application) 





1) Describe your hands-on experience with MYOB Business (or similar) for Australian clients. List specific tasks you've handled (e.g., bill entry, reconciliation, STP payroll, P&L reports) and mention any invoice automation tools like EzzyBills if you've used them.



2) Have you worked with Australian hospitality or franchise clients? Briefly explain your knowledge of GST, BAS, STP, superannuation, and PAYG. Give one example of helping a client stay compliant or liaising with their accountant.



3) Give an example of how you've helped a business owner see their financial position better (e.g., weekly reports, cost/margin tracking, dashboards, or P&L commentary). What tools did you use and what was the result?



4) Describe a time you proactively identified and fixed a financial or operational issue for a client. Also confirm you can work ~20 hours/week during Sydney business hours (9 AM–5 PM AEDT / 6 AM–2 PM Manila time).

title: Remote Telemarketer
Project Manager – Luxury Travel (Remote)
description:
BLUEFLOWER TRAVEL COMPANY

Blueflower is a global travel design company crafting intelligent, highly personalized journeys. We design meaningful travel experiences with structure, precision, and care. Our team works remotely across countries and time zones, united by a commitment to excellence and elegant execution. Visit us at www.blueflower.la



The Role

We are hiring a Project Manager – Luxury Travel who will manage travel projects from planning to completion. This is not a call center or ticketing role. It requires project leadership, coordination, and professional client handling.



Responsibilities

·   Manage the end-to-end planning and execution of client journeys as structured projects

Ascension Business Solutions LLC is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and execution-focused Executive Assistant (EA) to support the CEO with daily operations, communications, and cross-departmental coordination.



The EA will be responsible for efficiently managing the CEO’s calendar, overseeing project timelines, and maintaining alignment between the leadership team and external stakeholders. This role is essential to supporting the CEO’s strategic initiatives and ensuring smooth, organized operations across the business. The ideal candidate is highly detail-oriented, accountable, and comfortable working with autonomy within a fast-paced, high-expectation environment.

Calendar & Communication Management: Efficiently manage the CEO’s calendar, schedule meetings, prioritize appointments, and filter
s for timely responses.

Support Strategic Initiatives: Track project timelines, deliverables, and support execution to meet business objectives.

Internal & External Communication: Handle communication with clients, team members, and external stakeholders on behalf of the CEO.

Business Development Support: Work closely with Business Development Coordinators to ensure alignment on goals and objectives, including outreach, coordination, and reporting.

AI Tools Proficiency: Assist the CEO in utilizing AI tools and techniques to streamline operations and improve productivity.

Logistical Support: Provide logistical and administrative support for meetings, company events, conferences, and other executive activities.

Confidentiality & Record Management: Maintain and update administrative records, ensuring accuracy and confidentiality at all times.



QUALIFICATIONS: 

Graduate of a 4-year course or a Bachelor’s degree

2–3+ years of proven experience as an Executive Assistant or in a similar high-level administrative role

Strong combination of hard and soft skills with expertise in multitasking, project coordination, and data management

Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills

PREFERRED (BUT NOT REQUIRED):

Background in business development, healthcare, or regulated service environments

COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.

Enjoy long-term stability with clear career growth opportunities

Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence

REQUIRED SKILLS

- Advanced Photoshop

- Clipping path

- Masking

- Color correction

- Experience editing metallic objects

- Understanding of highlight protection

- Ability to follow detailed style guide

WHAT WE VALUE

- Consistency over flash

- Attention to tonal detail

- Responsiveness to feedback

- Long-term working relationship

mbers across multiple countries. We're growing again, and we'd love for you to consider us for the next phase of your career.



About the Role

This is a hands-on technical role at the core of how we deliver results for our partners and their clients. You'll be responsible for the technical health of websites across our campaign portfolio, diagnosing crawl issues, improving site performance, implementing schema, and making sure every site we work on is set up to rank. You'll also play an active role in publishing and managing content across client sites, ensuring every piece goes live correctly, is properly optimised, and is free of issues.

You'll work closely with our campaign managers and SEO strategists. When something is broken, people will look to you. When a site migration is on the horizon, you'll be the one leading it. This is a role for someone who takes ownership seriously.



What You'll Do

Conduct technical SEO audits as part of campaign onboarding and ongoing quarterly planning

Own crawlability, indexation, site architecture, and internal linking across client campaigns

Publish, format, and QA content across client WordPress sites, including blog posts, landing pages, geo pages, and on-page optimisation updates

Implement and QA structured data and schema markup across all page types

Optimise Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) and overall page experience signals

Manage XML sitemaps, hreflang, robots.txt, and canonical tag strategies

Lead site migrations, redirect management, and URL restructuring projects

Monitor performance via Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, and Screaming Frog

Identify and resolve duplicate content, crawl waste, and thin content issues across a diverse client portfolio

Stay current with algorithm updates and adjust strategies proactively



What We're Looking For

You know technical SEO well, not just in theory, but in practice. You've spent real time in the weeds of crawl data, page speed reports, and WordPress backends, and you're comfortable there. You're the kind of person who, if they say they're going to fix something, actually fixes it.

You're detail-oriented without losing sight of the bigger picture. You can look at a site audit and know what matters, what doesn't, and what needs to be communicated to the campaign team. You're not waiting to be told what to do next; you're already looking ahead.



What You Must Have

3–6 years of hands-on technical SEO experience, ideally in an agency or white label environment

Deep proficiency with WordPress, including content publishing workflows, Yoast/RankMath, page builders, theme architecture, and custom post types. Most of our client sites run on WordPress

Solid working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as they relate to SEO. You can read source code, identify rendering issues, and flag problems without needing a developer to translate

Comfortable publishing and formatting content in CMS environments with a sharp eye for detail, including headings, internal links, meta data, image alt text, and page structure

Familiarity with server-side concepts: HTTP status codes, .htaccess, server logs, CDN configuration

Confident using Screaming Frog, Sitebulb, Ahrefs, SEMrush, GSC, and Lighthouse

Strong written communication that is clear, professional, and easy to follow when handing off findings to the rest of the team



What Will Give You an Edge

Agency experience, either in technical SEO fulfillment or a similar delivery role

Exposure to local SEO campaigns or multi-location businesses, a core client type for us

Familiarity with GA4, Google Search Console, and AgencyAnalytics

Experience with eCommerce SEO (WooCommerce, Shopify)

Ability to write basic scripts in Python or JavaScript for SEO automation

ClickUp or comparable PM software experience
