title: High Ticket Sales Closer
description:
Job Title

High-Ticket Sales Closer (Remote – Global)



Employment Type: Full-Time / Contract

Location: Remote (Global Applicants Welcome)



About the Role

We are a UK-based property company operating a growing co-living and student accommodation portfolio across multiple cities. We are looking for an exceptional High-Ticket Sales Closer who can convert qualified leads into confirmed bookings through virtual sales conversations.

This is not a lead generation role.

Your job is simple:

Close.



Leads will come through our enquiry channels. Your responsibility is to convert interested prospects into confirmed tenants through structured conversations and professional sales discipline.

If you are a true closer, you will thrive in this role.

If you rely on scripts, hand-holding, or pressure tactics, this is not the position for you.



The Test

We do not hire based on CVs or promises.

If you believe you are a strong closer, you will demonstrate it.

Qualified candidates will be invited to a live virtual remote closing conversation.

If you can close that conversation effectively, you get the role.

Simple.





What You Will Be Responsible For

Conduct virtual sales conversations with prospective tenants and bookings and contracts

Understand prospect needs and position the property as the right solution.

Handle very tough objections

Convert qualified prospects into confirmed bookings.

Maintain disciplined follow-up with prospects who have viewed properties.

Provide brief reporting on conversion outcomes.





Who This Role Is For

This role is for sales professionals who are confident closing deals virtually and are comfortable being judged purely on results.



You should be:

Comfortable handling sales conversations with international clients.

Able to think independently during negotiations.

Calm under pressure and able to handle objections.

Focused on outcomes rather than activity.





What We Are Looking For

Proven experience closing deals through virtual conversations.

Strong communication skills and clear spoken English.

Ability to build trust quickly during conversations.

Confidence handling pricing discussions and objections.

Comfort working in a performance-driven environment.





Compensation

Compensation will be competitive and aligned with performance.

We are prepared to reward strong closers who can consistently convert qualified prospects into confirmed bookings.

Details will be discussed with successful candidates.





Application Process

If you believe you are a strong closer, apply with:

A short summary of your closing experience.

The types of products or services you have sold.

The average deal value you are used to closing.

A brief description of your closing process.

All the above through a video, which you must share on 



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to demonstrate their closing ability in a live conversation.



Important

This role is designed for experienced closers.

If you can confidently convert interested prospects into paying customers through virtual conversations, you will be rewarded well in this position.

If you cannot demonstrate that ability, this role will not be suitable.

title: Remote Lawyer PQE 3 - 5 years
description:
Remote Lawyer (3–6 Years Exp) – Migration & HR Support



TYPE OF WORK

Full Time





WAGE / SALARY

$1,300 – $1,800





HOURS PER WEEK

40





DATE UPDATED

Mar 3, 2026



 JOB OVERVIEW

Remote Lawyer (3–6 Years Exp) – Migration & HR Support

Company: Cornerstone Migration Australia

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

Engagement: Independent Contractor (B2B / Service-based)

Compensation: $1,500 – $2,000 AUD per month

Bonus: Performance-based incentives for lodgements and accuracy.



About the Firm

Cornerstone Migration is a premier Australian migration and HR consultancy led by a Registered Migration Agent with 19 years of experience (16 years in Australia). We handle complex employer-sponsored visas, compliance, and workforce strategy. We are fast-paced, high-standard, and results-driven.



The Role

We are not looking for a litigator. We are looking for a documentation specialist—a Philippine-qualified lawyer who is exceptionally fast, structured, and precise. You will be the engine room of our case preparation.



Your primary tasks will include:



Drafting high-level visa submissions and legal representations.



Preparing and reviewing complex contracts, agreements, and corporate HR documents.



Organizing and auditing supporting evidence for visa cases to ensure 100% compliance.



Conducting targeted legal research (Australian Migration and HR context).



Managing structured workflows to ensure rapid turnaround times.



Requirements

Experience: 3 to 6 years of post-qualification experience (PQE).



Credentials: Philippine Bar passer (mandatory).



Drafting Skills: Elite written English. You must be able to write logically, persuasively, and professionally.



Efficiency: High output capacity. You must be "quick" without sacrificing quality.



Technical: Advanced Microsoft Word formatting skills (essential for our professional standards).



Setup: Reliable fiber/nbn internet connection and a dedicated quiet workspace.



Schedule: Must be available during Australian business hours (Brisbane time).



Contractual Terms

Independent Contractor: This is a service-based engagement, not an employment contract.



Flat Fee: The monthly fee is all-inclusive $1,300 – $1,800 There is no 13th-month pay, paid leave, or government contributions provided.



Performance Bonuses: We reward excellence. Bonuses are available based on accuracy, volume of lodgements, and successful outcomes.



How to Apply



Send to ----------



To apply, please provide:



Updated CV.



Proof of Bar Admission.



A Writing Sample: A formal legal letter or a structured submission you have drafted.



Intro Video: A 1-minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you excel at documentation-heavy work.



ABOUT THE EMPLOYER

Business or Contact Name: Cornerstone Migration Australia

title: Customer Support Rep
description:
We’re a fast-growing streetwear brand shipping across the United States, focused on building a strong, culture-driven community of fashion-forward individuals. Our brand blends elevated design with everyday wearability, and we’re looking for a sharp, reliable Customer Support Representative to help us deliver a premium customer experience that matches our product.



You will be responsible for managing all customer inquiries Monday through Friday. After a brief training period, you’ll take full ownership of customer communication, ensuring fast, thoughtful, and professional responses across
 and social channels. We use Gorgias to manage and track all support activity, and your performance will be measured against key customer support KPIs (response time, resolution time, customer satisfaction, etc.).



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



- Respond to all customer messages every weekday in a timely and professional manner



- Own customer inquiries from first response to final resolution



- Coordinate with our warehouse to process returns, exchanges, and order issues



- Monitor and track support metrics inside Gorgias



- Communicate directly with the owner regarding order updates, shipping issues, and operational concerns



- Ensure all customer touch-points reflect our brand voice and community values



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Highly organized and detail-oriented



- Strong written communication skills



- Comfortable working independently and taking ownership



- Proactive with problem-solving and follow-through



- Experience with Gorgias preferred



You’ll help shape the customer experience of a growing streetwear brand and contribute to building a loyal fashion community in the U.S.

title: Senior Symfony / React Developer – Long Term Collaboration
description:
I am looking for a senior developer to collaborate on multiple ongoing projects. The main stack currently includes PHP, Symfony, React, JavaScript, CSS, HTML and MySQL.



You will not be working on a one-off task, but rather joining a small development team where we collaborate closely. We work in a structured way with weekly standups, discussions about architecture, and shared responsibility for code quality and project decisions.



I value long-term collaboration and believe good developers should be appreciated and rewarded. When someone consistently delivers quality work, I make sure this is reflected in trust, responsibility and compensation.



I am a senior developer myself and run multiple projects for different clients. Because the number of projects keeps growing, I am looking for someone experienced who can actively think along about architecture, best practices and long-term maintainability, not just execute tasks.



We are specifically looking for a senior profile with several years of professional experience who is comfortable working independently and contributing ideas.



Our core stack is:

 • Symfony

 • React

but depending on the project we also work with technologies such as:

 • Python / Django

 • Next.js

 • Sylius

 • AI integrations and automation

 • other modern web technologies when needed



Quality is extremely important. I value clean architecture, maintainable code, and good communication. In the beginning I will of course review code and align on approaches, but over time you will get more autonomy and responsibility within the team.



This is intended as a long-term collaboration, not just a short assignment.



The compensation depends on your experience, profile and availability, so the indicated budget is flexible.

The Challenge

 flow revenue reaches 10% of total store revenue within the first 90 days

title: Google Media Ads Buyer (Remote & flexible)
description:
GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where smart ideas turn into real impact.

We build and scale online brands across international markets, and we empower our tea
mbers to take ownership, grow quickly, and shape the future of our business alongside us.





Why This Role Exists

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company .



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment. You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This is a role for someone who wants to build, improve, and grow, not just maintain the status quo.





What You’ll Own & Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding, structure, and feed performance





What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience with Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)



- Has experience handling high-budget campaigns ($300K+/month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and makes decisions based on data, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and finding performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact





Ready to Grow With Us?

If you’re looking for a role where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your impact is visible — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Marketing & Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a Marketing & Administrative Virtual Assistant to help manage digital marketing campaigns, handle administrative tasks, and support backend operations for our educational platform. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with experience in digital marketing, CRM tools, and administrative support.





The position is part-time, requiring 20 hours per week (4 hours per day) with a flexible schedule, including some overlap with Pacific Time.





Job duties and responsibilities:

 

1. Marketing Support:

        - Assist in the creation and management of digital advertising campaigns on Google and
, ensuring 

          compliance with platform guidelines.

        - Research strategies to improve ad approval rates and maximize reach, particularly in the context of psychedelic-

           related content.

        - Monitor ad performance, adjust targeting, and conduct split testing to optimize results.

         - Manage and update
 marketing campaigns via MailChimp, including audience segmentation and automation  

             setup.

       - Maintain and update social media content and engagement strategies.

       - Create landing pages, lead magnets, and social media graphics consistent with our established brand identity.

       - Research and implement growth strategies to expand our audience, particularly individuals with life-threatening 

           illnesses and medical professionals.



 2. Administrative Support:

         - Manage backend operations for our education platform (Thinkific), including generating course certificates.

title: Senior Marketing Specialist (Strategy & Execution)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Marketing Specialist (STRATEGIST) to take full ownership of the marketing strategy and execution for three established financial services brands operating in the UK market.



This is not a junior or assistant role.



You will be responsible for developing strategy, implementing campaigns, managing social media presence, and driving brand visibility and lead generation.



If you need constant supervision or you are still learning marketing fundamentals, this role is not for you.



We are looking for someone highly experienced, self-driven, and capable of running marketing independently.



About Us



You will work with three brands within the same financial services group:



• Best Brokers – Mortgage brokerage

• Financial Expert Independent – Financial advisory network

• ProActivLife – Personal protection and insurance



All businesses operate in the UK regulated financial sector, which means marketing must be professional, compliant, and well thought out.



Each brand requires its own marketing strategy and positioning.



You will collaborate with advisers and key tea
mbers representing each brand, but you will lead the marketing direction agreed with each executive.



Your Mission



Your role is to design and run the marketing engine for the group.



This includes:



• Creating marketing strategies for each brand

• Building strong presence on key platforms

• Generating brand visibility and leads

• Coordinating content and campaigns across the organisation

• Using AI tools and automation to scale marketing efforts



You will not be micromanaged.



We expect you to propose ideas, implement them, and measure results.



Key Platforms



You must have strong experience with:



LinkedIn

• Personal branding for key individuals

• Company page growth

• Lead generation strategies

• B2B positioning



TikTok

• Strategy for brand presence

• Short-form video planning

• Content ideas for financial services

• Audience growth and engagement



 / Instagram

• Content planning

• Page management

• Engagement and organic reach



We are also open to additional marketing channels and ideas if you believe they can generate results.



Responsibilities



• Create and manage marketing strategies for three brands

• Build structured content calendars for each platform

• Develop brand presence on LinkedIn and TikTok

• Manage social media accounts and campaigns

• Coordinate content creation with advisers and tea
mbers

• Use AI tools to accelerate content and marketing production

• Monitor analytics and improve performance

• Ensure marketing stays compliant with UK financial services regulations

• Continuously develop new lead generation opportunities



Requirements



Minimum 5 years of marketing experience.



You must demonstrate strong experience in:



• Digital marketing strategy

• Social media growth

• LinkedIn marketing

• Content strategy

• Brand positioning

• AI marketing tools

• Campaign planning and execution



This is a senior independent role, so we are looking for someone who:



• Is highly organised

• Can work without supervision

• Can build and execute strategy independently

• Takes full ownership of results



This Role Is NOT Suitable If



• You are a beginner in marketing

• You only post social media content without strategy

• You require detailed instructions for every task

• You are still learning marketing fundamentals



Tools We Use



You may work with tools such as:



• AI content tools

• Social media schedulers

• Analytics platforms

• CRM systems

• Marketing automation tools



Experience with AI-driven marketing will be a strong advantage.



How to Apply



To apply, please complete the following steps:



1?? Record a short video (maximum 2 minutes)

Tell us:



• Your marketing background

• What results you achieved in previous roles

• Why you believe you are the right person for this role



2?? Send your application including:



• Your CV

• Links to campaigns or brands you worked on

• Links to 3 social media accounts you helped grow



and answer a simple question: What would be your first 90-day marketing priorities for this project?



Applications without video introduction will not be reviewed.



Selection Process



1?? Application review

2?? Short video introduction

3?? Interview

4?? Short strategy exercise

5?? Final selection



What We Offer



• Long-term remote position

• Work with established UK financial brands

• Freedom to implement marketing strategies

• Opportunity to build a marketing system from the ground up

title: Executive Assistant (Virtual)
description:
Location: Remote

Company: Oasis Plants Ltd

Experience Required: 2–3 years as a Virtual Assistant



About Oasis Plants Ltd



Oasis Plants Ltd is a UK-based interior landscaping company delivering high-quality plant design, installation, and maintenance services to commercial spaces. We work with offices, developers, and corporate clients to create environments that are vibrant, professional, and well-maintained.

As we continue to grow, we are looking for a highly capable Executive Assistant to support our operations team and help drive efficiency across the business.



About the Role

We are seeking a sharp, driven, and highly organized Executive Assistant (Virtual) to support our operations team. This role is primarily service administration-focused, ensuring that tasks are completed efficiently and systems are maintained accurately.

This is a fast-paced role suited for someone who is hungry to grow, humble in approach, and smart in execution.



Who You Are

You are:

Hungry – Ambitious, proactive, and eager to grow

Humble – Team-oriented, open to feedback, and solutions-focused

Smart – Quick thinker with strong common sense and problem-solving ability

You also have:

Very strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

Excellent
 management skills

Strong systems mindset (organized, process-driven, detail-oriented)

High attention to detail

A driven and sharp personality

2–3 years of experience as a Virtual Assistant



Key Responsibilities

Responsibilities may vary from time to time but will primarily include:

Supporting the operations team in completing daily and weekly tasks

Service administration and coordination

Managing and responding to
s professionally

Updating and maintaining systems and records

Following processes and improving workflow efficiency

Ensuring tasks are completed accurately and on time

What We’re Looking For

Someone systematic and process-oriented

Highly reliable and accountable

Comfortable working independently

Professional in communication and presentation

Able to prioritize and execute without constant supervision



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your CV

A short introduction about yourself

A brief explanation of why you believe you are Hungry, Humble, and Smart

title: Laravel/VueJS Developer
description:
Co-Foundry, a digital product development company based in South Africa, is looking for experience developers based in the Philippines with skills in Laravel/VueJS/Docker.





The company provides solutions to companies both locally and internationally. They believe in providing developers an opportunity to shine and become masters in their field. If you believe in strong standards, don’t-repeat-yourself practices, and think in components of code rather than monolithic methods, then this job is right for you.





Many apply but few are selected, so to qualify you must be able to demonstrate your ability.

You will be working in a fast-paced environment on a diverse set of projects in a team environment. Projects cover web and mobile applications, customer portals, business workflow applications, and 3rd party integrations.





Laravel, VueJS, Sass, PHP and JavaScript experience are essential as these will be your key responsibilities. Experience with ReactJS, React Native and REST services is a bonus.





As a backend / PHP / Laravel developer you will be responsible for implementing solutions based on technical lead direction. This includes applying your knowledge of Laravel and writing Controllers, Models, Services, and a variety of other Laravel features. Working with queries and 3rd party API’s is a must.





As a frontend / JavaScript / VueJS developer you will be responsible for scripting visual and interactive elements that achieve the UI/UX guidelines. A strong sense of design and building user interfaces is a must. You will also be tasked with Mobile App development in React Native.

You will be assessed on your technical skill through a practical brief.





Your key responsibilities will be:



Code development and architecture based on development lead specifications.

Converting design changes and UX requirements into front-end and back-end code.

Building web applications with frontend and backend code, dependent on the project and your role in the team per project.

Working with PHP, Laravel, VueJS, and React.





Skills and Specifications:



5+ years’ work experience with PHP and JavaScript.

5+ years’ work experience with HTML5 and CSS3.

3+ years’ work experience with Laravel and VueJS.

2+ years’ work experience with frameworks like CakePHP, ReactJS and React Native.

Experience with GIT and version control is vital.

Strong understanding of Object Oriented and Event Driven Programming.

Excellent command of English and communication is of critical importance (you might be coding but communication and understanding is vital).





Beneficial Experience / Qualification (optional yet highly recommended):



Degree/Diploma in Development or technical field a bonus but not mandatory.

Experience with GIT, Bower, Webpack, NPM and others.

Experience with Unit test development.





Personal skills/attributes:



You desire good leadership and clear goals in what is needed and wanted from you.

You are solution oriented, enjoy problem solving and working with others.

You have good communication skills and work well with others.





Compensation/Rate:



Salary/Rate is based on your region, skills and experience.

title: VA Admin Support and Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent
